title: FIFA World Cup: Tobin Heath on record goals, France and Lamine Yamal
english: Former United States football star Tobin Heath, a two-time World Cup winner, is providing expert analysis for the 2026 FIFA World Cup as part of a specialized technical panel. Now retired from professional play, Heath is evaluating the tournament's high scoring rate, emerging talents like Lamine Yamal, and the performance of top national teams. Her unique insights from the sidelines have gained significant attention as the competition approaches its final match.
amharic: የቀድሞዋ የአሜሪካ እግር ኳስ ኮከብ እና የሁለት ጊዜ የዓለም ዋንጫ አሸናፊዋ ቶቢን ሂዝ፣ ለ2026 የፊፋ ዓለም ዋንጫ ልዩ የቴክኒክ ተንታኝ ሆና እየሰራች ነው። ከሙያዊ ስፖርት ጡረታ የወጣችው ሂዝ፣ የዘንድሮውን ውድድር ከፍተኛ የጎል ብዛት፣ እንደ ላሚን ያማል ያሉ ወጣት ተጫዋቾችን እና የቡድኖችን አቋም እየገመገመች ትገኛለች። ውድድሩ ወደ ፍጻሜው በተቃረበበት በዚህ ወቅት፣ ሂዝ የምትሰጣቸው ሙያዊ ትንታኔዎች በአድናቂዎች ዘንድ ትልቅ ትኩረት ስበዋል።
oromo: Leeyyuun taphattuu kubbaa miillaa Ameerikaa durii fi injifattuun waancaa addunyaa si'a lamaa Tobin Heath, waancaa addunyaa 2026 irratti akka ogeessa xiinxaltuutti hirmaachaa jirti. Tapha ogummaa ishee erga dhaabdee booda, amma waa'ee baay'ina galchiiwwan taphataman, dandeettii dargaggeessa Lamine Yamal fi qophii garee biyyoolessotaa irratti xiinxala kenniti. Taphoonni kun gara xumuraatti yeroo dhiyaatanitti, xiinxalli isheen kennitu hordoftoota kubbaa miillaa biratti fudhatama guddaa argatee jira.

title: Guyana ferry with 116 people on board capsizes; more than 50 rescued
english: A passenger ferry named MV Barima capsized off the coast of Guyana while traveling from Georgetown to Port Kaituma with 116 people on board. Search and rescue teams have successfully saved 53 individuals so far, while efforts continue to locate the remaining missing passengers. Authorities have deployed medical teams to the area and are actively coordinating with coastguards and private vessels to assist in the rescue operation.
amharic: በጉያና ኤምቪ ባሪማ የተባለ የሰዎች ማመላለሻ መርከብ ከጆርጅታውን ወደ ፖርት ካይቱማ በመጓዝ ላይ እያለ በባህር ውስጥ ተገልብጧል። በመርከቧ ውስጥ የነበሩትን 116 ሰዎች ለመታደግ በተደረገው ጥረት እስካሁን 53 ሰዎች በህይወት ተረፈዋል። የሀገሪቱ ባለስልጣናት እና የባህር ጠረፍ ጠባቂዎች የጠፉትን ሌሎች ተሳፋሪዎች ለመፈለግ እና ለመታደግ በከፍተኛ ሁኔታ እየሰሩ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Markaabni namoota 116 fe'atee gara magaalaatti imalaa ture tokko biyya Guyyaanaa keessatti galaana keessatti gombifameera. Hanga ammaa namoonni 53 lubbuun kan ooltan yoo ta'u, barbaacha namoota hafanis ittifufeera. Mootummaan biyyattii fi gargaartonni hatattamaa bakka balaan sun itti mudate sanatti namoota hafan barbaaduuf hojjechaa jiru.

title: Iranians suffer from power blackouts during war and heatwave
english: Iranians are experiencing frequent, widespread power outages as the country’s electricity grid fails under the pressure of intense heatwaves and recent military strikes. Despite official promises that the power supply would remain stable, the infrastructure has been severely damaged, disrupting everything from academic exams to essential medical care. Citizens are facing a deepening crisis as both the economy and daily life suffer from these persistent blackouts.
amharic: ኢራን ውስጥ የኃይል ማመንጫ መሠረተ ልማቶች በከባድ የሙቀት መጠን እና በቅርብ ጊዜ በተፈጸሙ ወታደራዊ ጥቃቶች በመጎዳታቸው የኤሌክትሪክ መቆራረጥ በስፋት እየተከሰተ ይገኛል። መንግስት የኤሌክትሪክ አቅርቦት እንደማይቋረጥ ቃል ገብቶ የነበረ ቢሆንም፣ አሁን ያለው ሁኔታ የትምህርት ፈተናዎችን እና የህክምና አገልግሎቶችን ጨምሮ የዜጎችን የእለት ተእለት ሕይወት በእጅጉ እየጎዳ ነው። ይህ የኤሌክትሪክ ችግር በሀገሪቱ የኢኮኖሚ እና የማህበራዊ እንቅስቃሴ ላይ ከፍተኛ ጫና እያሳደረ ነው።
oromo: Iraan keessatti ho’a cimaa fi miidhaa rukuttaa waraanaarra gaheen walqabatee, babal’inni kutaannaan humna ibsaa rakkoo hamaa ta’e uumee jira. Mootummaan dhiyeessiin ibsaa akka hin citne waadaa seene tureyyuu, manca’iinsi bu’uuraalee misoomaa barnoota, tajaajila fayyaa fi jireenya guyyuu irratti dhiibbaa guddaa fidee jira. Rakkoon kun jireenya hawaasaa fi diinagdee biyyattii irratti miidhaa cimaa geessisaa jira.

title: Gaza cheers for Spain as World Cup final anticipation mounts
english: Football fans in Gaza are throwing their support behind the Spanish national team in the upcoming World Cup final against Argentina. This backing stems from the Spanish government's diplomatic stance on the conflict and public displays of solidarity by Spanish athletes toward Palestinians. Despite the immense challenges of limited electricity and fuel during the war, locals have organized simulated matches to celebrate and express their hope for a Spanish victory.
amharic: በጋዛ የሚገኙ እግር ኳስ አፍቃሪዎች በቅርቡ በሚካሄደው የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ ከስፔን ቡድን ጎን እንደሚቆሙ ገልጸዋል። ይህ ድጋፍ የመጣው የስፔን መንግሥት ለፍልስጤም ባለው አቋም እና የስፔን ስፖርተኞች ለፍልስጤማውያን በሚያሳዩት አጋርነት ነው። በጦርነቱ ምክንያት የኤሌክትሪክ እና የነዳጅ እጥረት ቢኖርም፣ የጋዛ ነዋሪዎች የስፔንን ድል ለመመኘት እና ስሜታቸውን ለመግለጽ በአካባቢያቸው የዓለም ዋንጫን መልክ የያዙ ጨዋታዎችን አዘጋጅተዋል።
oromo: Jaalattoonni kubbaa miillaa Gaza keessa jiran tapha xumuraa goolii Addunyaa irratti garee Ispeen akka deeggaran ibsaniiru. Deeggarsi kun kan madde mootummaan Ispeen dhimma Palastiinii irratti qabuufi atileetonni biyyattii gama isaaniitiin deeggarsa argisiisuun isaaniiti. Walitti bu'iinsa jiru irraa kan ka'e rakkoon elektirikii fi boba'aa jiraatus, uummanni Gaza injifannoo Ispeen hawwuuf jecha taphoota fakkaataa ta'an qopheeffachuun gammachuu isaanii ibsachaa jiru.

title: Du Plessis makes winning return to UFC with dominant decision over Usman
english: Dricus Du Plessis successfully returned to the UFC octagon by defeating Kamaru Usman via a unanimous decision in Oklahoma City. The South African fighter dominated the stand-up battle, landing significantly more strikes than his opponent throughout the match. This victory marks a strong comeback for Du Plessis after his previous title loss to Khamzat Chimaev.
amharic: ድሪከስ ዱ ፕሌሲስ በአሜሪካ ኦክላሆማ ሲቲ በተካሄደው የዩኤፍሲ ውድድር ካማሩ ኡስማንን በነጥብ በማሸነፍ ወደ ድል ተመልሷል። የደቡብ አፍሪካዊው ተዋጊ በቆመበት የትግል ዘይቤ ብልጫ በመውሰድ ተጋጣሚውን በብዙ የጡጫ ጥቃቶች መርታት ችሏል። ይህ ድል ከካምዛት ቺማዬቭ ጋር ካደረገው ሽንፈት በኋላ ለዱ ፕሌሲስ ትልቅ የሞራል ግንባታ ሆኗል።
oromo: Dricus Du Plessis magaala Oklahoma City keessatti qabsoo UFC taasifameen Kamaru Usman mo'achuun gara injifannootti deebi'eera. Fincilaan Afrikaa Kibbaa kun qabsoo isaarratti gadi dhaabbachuun rukuttaa hedduu nama isaa irratti raawwachuun injifannoo argateera. Injifannoon kun Du Plessis qabsoo Khamzat Chimaev waliin taasise injifatamee booda deebi'ee cimina isaa agarsiisuuf isa gargaareera.

title: World Cup 2026 final: Closing ceremony and half-time show – what to know
english: The 2026 World Cup final between Spain and Argentina will be held at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey on July 19. The event features a closing ceremony before the match and a special musical performance during an extended half-time break. Jennifer Hudson is also scheduled to perform the U.S. national anthem prior to the 3pm kickoff.
amharic: የ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ በስፔን እና በአርጀንቲና መካከል ሐምሌ 19 ቀን በኒው ጀርሲ ሜትላይፍ ስታዲየም ይካሄዳል። ውድድሩ ከመጀመሩ በፊት የማጠቃለያ ስነ-ስርዓት የሚኖር ሲሆን፣ በእረፍት ሰዓት ላይም ልዩ የሙዚቃ ትርኢቶች ይቀርባሉ። በተጨማሪም ጄኒፈር ሃድሰን ከቀኑ 9 ሰዓት ጨዋታው ከመጀመሩ በፊት የአሜሪካን ብሔራዊ መዝሙር ትዘምራለች።
oromo: Xumura Waancaa Addunyaa bara 2026 kan Ispeenii fi Arjantiinaa gidduutti ta'u, Adoolessa 19, dirree MetLife Stadium kan Niiw Jersiitti gaggeeffama. Qophiin kun taphichi utuu hin jalqabin sirna cufiinsaa fi boqonnaa walakkaa taphaa irratti agarsiisa muuziqaa addaa of keessatti qabata. Akkasumas, taphichi sa'aatii sagaliitti utuu hin jalqabin dura, Jeeniifar Haadisan faaruu biyyoolessaa Ameerikaa ni dhiheessi.

title: Five people rescued after Indonesia boat sinks, at least 20 still missing
english: Five individuals, including a young child, were saved after surviving three days at sea by clinging to debris following a boat sinking off the coast of Sulawesi, Indonesia. While some passengers were rescued earlier, at least 20 people remain missing, and emergency teams are currently using ships and aircraft to search for them. The vessel had experienced engine failure before capsizing, highlighting ongoing concerns regarding maritime safety in the Indonesian archipelago.
amharic: ኢንዶኔዢያ ውስጥ ከሱላዌሲ የባህር ጠረፍ አቅራቢያ የሳምንት መጀመሪያ ላይ የተሳፈሩበት ጀልባ በመስጠሙ ምክንያት ለሶስት ቀናት በባህር ላይ ተንሳፈው የነበሩ አምስት ሰዎች በህይወት ተረፈዋል። ቀደም ሲል ሌሎች ተሳፋሪዎች ቢድኑም፣ አሁንም ቢያንስ 20 ሰዎች የገቡበት ባለመታወቁ የፍለጋ ስራው በአውሮፕላን እና በጀልባዎች ተጠናክሮ ቀጥሏል። የጀልባዋ ሞተር በመበላሸቱ ምክንያት በተከሰተው በዚህ አደጋ፣ በኢንዶኔዢያ የባህር ላይ የደህንነት ችግሮች ዳግም መነጋገሪያ ሆነዋል።
oromo: Indooneziyaatti dooniin tokko imaltoota fe’ee utuu adeemu qarqara galaana Sulaawesii irratti gadi dhiitee, namoonni shan guyyaa sadiif manca’a doonii fi wantoota bishaan irra jiranitti qabachaa turuun lubbuun baraaramaniiru. Namoonni biroos duraan kan baraaraman yoo ta'u, amma garuu namoonni 20 ol ta'an waan dhabamaniif, gareen gargaarsaa doonii fi xiyyaaraan barbaacha itti fufanii jiru. Dooniin kun imala isaa irratti miidhaan maashinichaa waan mudateef kan liqimfame yoo ta'u, kunis rakkoo nageenyaa geejjiba galaana biyyattii irratti yaaddoo guddaa uumee jira.

title: US completes eighth night of strikes as Iran retaliates across Gulf
english: The United States has conducted an eighth night of military strikes across southern Iran, targeting defense facilities and IRGC units following the deaths of two American soldiers. Iran responded by launching drone and missile attacks against US-linked military sites in Kuwait and Bahrain, while also claiming to have downed an American drone. The ongoing conflict has severely damaged Iranian civilian infrastructure, including transport networks and hospitals, as both nations exchange warnings of further escalation.
amharic: አሜሪካ በሁለት ወታደሮቿ መገደል ምክንያት በደቡብ ኢራን ወታደራዊ ተቋማት እና በኢራን አብዮታዊ ዘበኛ ክፍሎች ላይ ለስምንተኛ ተከታታይ ሌሊት ጥቃት ፈጽማለች። ኢራን በምላሹ በኩዌት እና በባህሬን የሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ መሠረቶችን በድሮን እና በሮኬት ያጠቃች ሲሆን የአሜሪካን ድሮንም መትታ መጣሏን አስታውቃለች። ግጭቱ የኢራንን የመሠረተ ልማት አውታሮች፣ ሆስፒታሎች እና የመንገድ ትራንስፖርትን ክፉኛ የጎዳ ሲሆን፣ ሁለቱም ወገኖች ተጨማሪ የበቀል እርምጃ እንደሚወስዱ በማስፈራራት ላይ ናቸው።
oromo: Ameerikaan loltoota ishee lama ajjeefamuu hordofee, halkan saddeettaffaaf kibba Iraanitti buufataalee waraanaa fi garee irji-irji irratti haleellaa raawwatteetti. Iraanis kana hordofee buufataalee waraana Ameerikaa Kuweet fi Baahireyn keessa jiran irratti haleellaa doonii fi rookeetii raawwachuun, akkasumas doonii Ameerikaa tokko buusuu ishee beeksifteetti. Waraanni kun daandiiwwan, riqichota fi hospitaalota dabalatee bu'uuraalee misoomaa Iraan miidhuu isaa kan hime yoo ta'u, biyyoonni lameenuu tarkaanfii cimaa wal irratti fudhachuu akka itti fufan akeekkachiisaniiru.

title: Trump says he ‘couldn’t care less’ about Iran leaving nuclear agreement
english: Former President Donald Trump stated that he is unconcerned by Iran's decision to withdraw from a recent memorandum of understanding regarding its nuclear program. He emphasized that the primary goal of the United States continues to be preventing Iran from acquiring nuclear weapons. The agreement, which was intended to help resolve ongoing regional conflicts, was signed just last month.
amharic: ቀድሞ የነበሩት ፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ ኢራን በኑክሌር ፕሮግራሟ ዙሪያ የተፈረመውን ስምምነት መተውን ጉዳይ እንደማያሳስባቸው ገልጸዋል። የአሜሪካ ዋና አላማ ኢራን የኑክሌር መሳሪያ እንዳታገኝ መከላከል መሆኑን አጽንኦት ሰጥተው ተናግረዋል። ይህ ስምምነት ቀደም ሲል የነበሩ ግጭቶችን ለማስቆም ባለፈው ወር የተደረገ ነበር።
oromo: Pirezedaantiin duraanii Doonaald Tiraamp, Iraan waliigaltee dhimma niwukilaraa ishee irratti mallatteessite irraa bahuun ishee akka isaan hin yaaddessine dubbataniiru. Kaayyoon guddaan Ameerikaa, Iraan meeshaa niwukilaraa akka hin arganne ittisuu ta’uu ibsaniiru. Waliigalteen kun walitti bu’iinsa naannichaa tasgabbeessuuf ji’a darbe kan mallatteeffame ture.

title: Russia launches major ballistic missile attack on Kyiv
english: Russia recently conducted a significant ballistic missile and drone assault on Kyiv, resulting in at least one death and multiple injuries while damaging homes and public buildings. This major attack follows recent Ukrainian drone strikes against Russian industrial sites, including warehouses owned by the retailer Wildberries. Both nations continue to escalate these long-range attacks as the ongoing conflict intensifies.
amharic: ሩሲያ በቅርቡ በኪየቭ ላይ በባለስቲክ ሚሳኤል እና በድሮን ከፍተኛ ጥቃት በመሰንዘሯ ቢያንስ አንድ ሰው ሲሞት ሌሎች በርካቶች ቆስለዋል፤ የመኖሪያ ቤቶችና ሌሎች ተቋማትም ተጎድተዋል። ይህ ጥቃት የተፈጸመው ዩክሬን በሩሲያ የኢንዱስትሪ ማዕከላትና በዌልድቤሪስ መጋዘኖች ላይ ጥቃት ማድረሷን ተከትሎ ነው። ሁለቱም ሀገራት በጦርነቱ ማዕቀፍ ውስጥ እርስ በርስ የሚፈጽሙትን የረጅም ርቀት ጥቃት አጠናክረው ቀጥለዋል።
oromo: Raashiyaan dhiheenya kana magaalota gurguddoo Yukreeniifi keessattuu bulchiinsa Kyiv irratti miilaa fi xiyyaara malee (drones) haleellaa cimaa gaggeessiteetti. Haleellaa kanaan namni tokko yoo du'u, namoonni hedduun madaa'anii fi manneen jireenyaa fi dhaabbileen biroos miidhamaniiru. Haleellaan kun kan hordofe erga Yukreen buufataalee gurguddoo Raashiyaa fi bakkeewwan gabaa Wildberries irratti haleellaa geggeessitee booda. Gamtaan lameenis wal waraansa isaanii keessatti haleellaa fagoo irratti xiyyeeffachuu itti fufaniiru.

title: Cuban dissident Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara goes into exile in US
english: Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, a leading Cuban activist and artist, has moved to the United States after completing a five-year prison term. As the head of the San Isidro Movement, he was previously jailed for participating in historic anti-government protests in 2021. Upon his arrival in Miami, he expressed his ongoing commitment to fighting for freedom and democracy in Cuba, despite the government’s claims that his group is funded by foreign interests.
amharic: ታዋቂው የኩባ ተቃዋሚ እና አርቲስት ሉዊስ ማኑዌል ኦቴሮ አልካንታራ የአምስት ዓመት እስር ጊዜውን ከጨረሰ በኋላ ወደ አሜሪካ ተሰዷል። የሳን ኢሲድሮ ንቅናቄ መሪ የነበረው አልካንታራ፣ እ.ኤ.አ በ2021 በተካሄደው ታላቅ የጸረ-መንግስት ተቃውሞ ላይ በመሳተፉ ነበር ለእስር የተዳረገው። ወደ ማያሚ እንደደረሰም በኩባ ውስጥ ዲሞክራሲ እንዲሰፍንና የአምባገነንነት ሥርዓት እንዲያበቃ ትግሉን እንደሚቀጥል ገልጿል።
oromo: Artisti fi qeeqaa mootummaa Kuubaa beekamaa ta'e Luwis Maanuweel Ooteerwoo Alkaantaaraa hidhaa waggaa shanii erga xumuree booda gara Yunaayitid Isteetis godaaneera. Hogganaan sochii 'San Isidro Movement' kun, bara 2021 hiriira mormii mootummaa guddaa irratti hirmaachuu isaatiin hidhamee ture. Magaalaa Maayaamii erga ga'ee booda, mootummaan Kuubaa akka jijjiiramuufi dimokraasiin akka dhufu qabsoo isaa itti fufuuf waadaa galeera.

title: New EU border system tripling time at passport control, airport boss says
english: A new European Union digital border system, which requires non-EU travelers to provide fingerprints and photos upon arrival, has led to significantly longer waits at passport control. Airport officials and airlines like Ryanair report that the process has nearly tripled processing times, causing many passengers to face hours-long delays or even miss their travel connections. While the European Commission claims that most disruptions remain limited, many travelers are being advised to plan for extra time when entering the Schengen area.
amharic: የአውሮፓ ህብረት አባል ያልሆኑ መንገደኞች ወደ አውሮፓ ሲገቡ የጣት አሻራ እና የፎቶ መረጃ እንዲሰጡ የሚያስገድደው አዲሱ የዲጂታል ድንበር ቁጥጥር ስርዓት በፓስፖርት መቆጣጠሪያ ጣቢያዎች ከፍተኛ መዘግየትን አስከትሏል። የአየር ማረፊያ አስተዳዳሪዎች እና የራያን ኤር አየር መንገድ እንደገለጹት፣ ይህ አዲስ አሰራር የጉዞ ሂደቱን በሶስት እጥፍ በማራዘሙ ተጓዦች ለሰዓታት እንዲጠብቁ ወይም በረራቸውን እንዲያመልጡ እያደረገ ነው። የአውሮፓ ህብረት ኮሚሽን ችግሮቹ ውስን እንደሆኑ ቢገልጽም፣ ወደ አውሮፓ የሚጓዙ ሰዎች ተጨማሪ ጊዜ እንዲመድቡ ይመከራል።
oromo: Sirni daangaa dijitaalaa haaraan kan biyyoota miseensa Gamtaa Awurooppaa hin taaneef biyyatti yoo seenan quba fi suuraa akka kennan dirqisiisu, imaltootaaf qormaata guddaa ta'eera. Hojjettoonni dirree xiyyaaraa fi dhaabbanni xiyyaaraa Ryanair akka jedhanitti, sirni kun yeroo imaltoonni darban dachaa sadiin waan guddiseef, namoonni sa'aatii dheeraaf akka eegan ykn imala isaanii akka dhaban taasiiseera. Komishiniin Awurooppaa rakkoon kun kan daangeffame akka ta'e dubbatuus, namoonni gara biyyoota Awurooppaa imalan yeroo dabalataa akka qabaatan gorfamu.

title: US launches new Iran strikes after two soldiers killed: What’s the latest?
english: The United States military has conducted fresh airstrikes against Iranian targets following a deadly attack that killed two American soldiers in Jordan. These operations are focused on damaging the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps' military capabilities and protecting shipping routes in the Strait of Hormuz. The strikes have caused significant destruction to civilian infrastructure in southern Iran, which is complicating the movement of people and essential goods in the region.
amharic: በጆርዳን ሁለት የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች መገደላቸውን ተከትሎ አሜሪካ በኢራን ወታደራዊ ኢላማዎች ላይ አዲስ የአየር ጥቃት ፈጽማለች። ይህ ወታደራዊ እርምጃ የኢራን እስላማዊ አብዮታዊ ዘበኛ ኃይሎች አቅምን ለመቀነስ እና በሆርሙዝ ስትሬት አካባቢ የሚደረገውን የንግድ መርከቦች እንቅስቃሴ ለመጠበቅ ያለመ ነው። ጥቃቱ በደቡባዊ ኢራን የሚገኙ የሲቪል መሠረተ ልማቶችን በማውደሙ የሰዎች እና የዕቃዎች እንቅስቃሴ ከፍተኛ ችግር ውስጥ ገብቷል።
oromo: Amerika waraana ishee lamatu Jordaanii keessatti ajjeefamuu hordofee, tarkaanfii qilleensa irraa Iran irratti fudhatteetti. Tarkaanfiin kun kan xiyyeeffate humna waraana Iran kan 'Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps' jedhamu dadhabsiisuufi karaa dooniiwwan daldalaa kan Hormuz ittisuuf dha. Haleellaan kun bu'uuraalee misoomaa naannoo kibba Iran keessatti argaman waan mancaaseef, sochiin namootaa fi meeshaalee naannichaa baay'ee rakkisaa ta'eera.

title: From settlements to blocked recovery: Israeli strategy taking shape in Gaza
english: Israeli government officials are actively promoting plans to build illegal settlements in northern Gaza, signaling a desire to maintain permanent military control over the territory. Analysts suggest this strategy, which includes obstructing aid and destroying infrastructure, is designed to displace Palestinians from the region. While these actions contradict international law and proposed peace plans, they align with the long-standing goals of Israel's hard-right political factions.
amharic: የእስራኤል መንግስት ባለስልጣናት በሰሜን ጋዛ ህገ-ወጥ ሰፈራዎችን ለመገንባት የሚያስችሉ እቅዶችን በንቃት እየገፉ ሲሆን ይህም በአካባቢው ላይ ዘላቂ ወታደራዊ ቁጥጥር ለማድረግ ያላቸውን ፍላጎት ያሳያል። ተንታኞች እንደሚሉት ይህ የሰብአዊ እርዳታን ማስተጓጎልን እና መሠረተ ልማትን ማውደምን ያካተተ ስትራቴጂ ፍልስጤማውያንን ከክልሉ ለማፈናቀል የታቀደ ነው። እነዚህ ድርጊቶች ዓለም አቀፍ ህግን እና የቀረቡትን የሰላም እቅዶች የሚቃረኑ ቢሆንም፣ የእስራኤል ጠንካራ የቀኝ አክራሪ የፖለቲካ ቡድኖች የረዥም ጊዜ ግብ ጋር ይጣጣማሉ።
oromo: Hoggantoonni mootummaa Israa'el kaaba Gaazaatti qubata seeraan alaa ijaaruuf karoorfataa jiru, kunis naannicharratti to'annoo waraanaa dhaabbataa gochuuf fedhii akka qaban agarsiisa. Xiinxaltoonni akka jedhanitti, tooftaan gargaarsa namoomaa daangessuu fi bu'uuraalee misoomaa diiguu of keessatti qabate kun, Falasxiinota naannichaa buqqisuuf kan karoorfame dha. Gochawwan kun seera idil-addunyaa fi karoora nageenyaa dhiyaatan kan faallessan ta'us, akeeka garee siyaasaa Israa'el kan mirga hamaa ta'anii wajjin wal simata.

title: Spain fans bring the party to New York before World Cup final
english: Spanish soccer supporters gathered in New York City to celebrate ahead of the World Cup final against Argentina. Fans displayed great enthusiasm and expressed confidence that their young squad, led by Lamine Yamal, would emerge victorious. The city streets were filled with songs and chants as excitement reached a fever pitch before the big match.
amharic: የስፔን እግር ኳስ ደጋፊዎች ከአርጀንቲና ጋር ለሚያደርጉት የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ ጨዋታ በኒውዮርክ ከተማ በመሰብሰብ ደስታቸውን ገልጸዋል። ደጋፊዎቹ በወጣቱ ኮከብ ላሚን ያማል የሚመራው ቡድናቸው ዋንጫውን እንደሚያነሳ ከፍተኛ እምነት አላቸው። ለጨዋታው ያላቸውን ጉጉት በተለያዩ መዝሙሮች እና ጭፈራዎች በከተማዋ ጎዳናዎች ላይ አሳይተዋል።
oromo: Deggertonni kubbaa miillaa Ispeen tapha xumuraa Waancaa Addunyaa Arjentiinaa wajjin godhamuun dura magaalaan Nyuu Yoorkitti walgahaniiru. Deggertonni kun gareen isaanii kan dargaggeessa Lamine Yamal dursu kun injifannoo akka gonfatu abdii guddaa qabu. Miira gammachuu kana ibsuufis aadaa fi sirba isaanii fayyadamuun daandiiwwan magaalattii keessatti kabajaa oolaniiru.

title: Spain vs Argentina: World Cup final predictions, schedule, Messi news
english: Spain and Argentina are set to face off in the 2026 World Cup final in New Jersey, with data models currently favoring Spain to win the title. The match is highly anticipated due to the clash between veteran star Lionel Messi and rising Spanish talent Lamine Yamal. Despite concerns regarding wildfire smoke in the region, the weather is expected to clear up in time for the game, which will be attended by thousands of fans.
amharic: ስፔን እና አርጀንቲና በኒው ጀርሲ በሚካሄደው የ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ ለዋንጫ ይፋለማሉ፣ የውሂብ ትንታኔዎች ደግሞ ስፔን የማሸነፍ እድሏ ከፍ ያለ መሆኑን ያሳያሉ። ጨዋታው በሊዮኔል ሜሲ እና በወጣቱ የስፔን ተጫዋች ላሚን ያማል መካከል የሚደረግ በመሆኑ ከፍተኛ ትኩረት ስቧል። በክልሉ የነበረው የዱር እሳት ጭስ ስጋት ቢኖርም፣ ለጨዋታው ጊዜ የአየር ሁኔታው እንደሚስተካከል እና በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ደጋፊዎች በስታዲየም እንደሚገኙ ይጠበቃል።
oromo: Ispeeniifi Arjantiinan xumura Waancaa Addunyaa bara 2026 Niiw Jarziitti taphatamuuf qophaa’aa jiru; odeeffannoon qorannoo akka agarsiisutti Ispeen injifachuuf carraa guddaa qabdi. Taphi kun giddduu taphataa beekamaa Liyoonel Mesii fi dargaggeessa Ispeen Laamiin Yaamaal gidduutti kan taasifamu waan ta’eef xiyyeeffannoo guddaa argatee jira. Naannichatti aarri ibidda bosonaa isaan yaaddessaa ture iyyuu, guyyaa taphaatti qilleensi akka qulqullaa’u fi namoonni kumaatamaan lakka’aman istaadiyamichatti argamu jedhamee eegama.

title: Watch FIFA World Cup: Argentina, Spain make preparations ahead of final
english: Argentina and Spain are actively getting ready for the upcoming FIFA World Cup final in North America. The teams are focused on their final training and tactical preparations before the championship match. Fans around the world are anticipating a highly competitive showdown between these two football nations.
amharic: አርጀንቲና እና ስፔን በሰሜን አሜሪካ ለሚካሄደው የፊፋ የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ ጨዋታ በዝግጅት ላይ ይገኛሉ። ሁለቱ ቡድኖች ለዋንጫው ፍልሚያ አስፈላጊውን ስልጠና እና የጨዋታ እቅድ በማውጣት ላይ ናቸው። በአለም ዙሪያ ያሉ እግር ኳስ አፍቃሪዎችም በዚህ ጠንካራ የፍጻሜ ጨዋታ ላይ ከፍተኛ ትኩረት ሰጥተዋል።
oromo: Arjantiinanii fi Ispeen qophii isaanii xumuraa fiigichaa waancaa addunyaa FIFA kan Ameerikaa Kaabaatti gaggeeffamuuf taasisaa jiru. Gareewwan kunneen tapha xumuraa kana injifachuuf leenjii cimaa fi karoora tapha irratti xiyyeeffataniiru. Ispoortiitota addunyaa hunda biratti taphi kun akkaataa itti eeggamu guddaan itti kennameera.

title: Bahrain activates warning sirens as Iran launches missiles towards Gulf
english: Bahrain has triggered nationwide emergency sirens following a series of missile and drone attacks launched by Iran toward Gulf nations. Authorities have advised all residents to stay composed and seek immediate shelter in designated safe zones. This escalation follows the breakdown of a recent agreement between the U.S. and Iran, leading to growing international concern over the potential for a large-scale conflict.
amharic: ኢራን ወደ ባህረ ሰላጤው አገራት ሚሳኤሎችን እና ድሮኖችን መተኮሷን ተከትሎ ባህሬን የአስቸኳይ ጊዜ የሳይረን ማስጠንቀቂያ አውጇል። የሀገሪቱ የውስጥ ጉዳይ ሚኒስቴር ነዋሪዎች መረጋጋትን ተላብሰው በአቅራቢያቸው ወደሚገኙ ደህንነታቸው የተጠበቁ ቦታዎች እንዲጠለሉ አሳስቧል። ይህ ውጥረት የተፈጠረው በአሜሪካ እና በኢራን መካከል የነበረው ጊዜያዊ ስምምነት በመፍረሱ ሲሆን፣ አሁን እየተባባሰ ያለው ግጭት ወደ ሙሉ ጦርነት ሊያመራ ይችላል የሚል ስጋት ፈጥሯል።
oromo: Iraaniin biyyoota Gulfiitiif xiyyaara malee fi misaa'ela erguu ishee hordofee, Baahireen sagalee akeekkachiisaa hatattamaa biyyattii guutuutti dhageessisteetti. Mootummaan biyyattii jiraattonni tasgabbaa’anii bakka nageenya qabuun dafanii akka dhokataniif gorsa kennee jira. Gidduu kana walii galteen Ameerikaa fi Iraanii gidduutti ture diigamuun isaa, waldhabdee kana gara waraana guutuutti akka geessuuf sodaa guddaa uumee jira.

title: US and Iran exchange strikes after two US soldiers killed in Jordan
english: Tensions between the United States and Iran have escalated following the deaths of two American soldiers during an attack in Jordan. In retaliation, the US military launched air strikes against Iranian defense facilities and units linked to the Revolutionary Guards. Iran responded by deploying drone attacks against US bases located in Kuwait, further deepening the conflict between the two nations.
amharic: በዮርዳኖስ በደረሰው ጥቃት ሁለት አሜሪካዊያን ወታደሮች መገደላቸውን ተከትሎ በአሜሪካ እና በኢራን መካከል ያለው ውጥረት አድጓል። አሜሪካ ለወሰደችው የበቀል እርምጃ የኢራን ወታደራዊ ተቋማትንና የሪቮሊዩሽነሪ ጋርድ ክፍሎችን የአየር ጥቃት የፈጸመች ሲሆን፣ ኢራንም በኩዌት በሚገኙ የአሜሪካ የጦር ሰፈሮች ላይ በድሮን ጥቃት መልሳለች። ይህም በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል ያለው የጦርነት ሁኔታ እንዲባባስ አድርጎታል።
oromo: Itoophiyaa fi Iraan gidduutti waraanni erga labsamee booda, waraana Yordaanos keessatti geggeeffameen loltoonni Ameerikaa lama du'uun isaanii walitti bu'iinsa dabaleera. Ameerikaan tarkaanfii deebii irree fi lafaa Iraan irratti kan fudhatte yoo ta'u, Iraanis dawoo waraana Ameerikaa Kuweyt keessa jiran irratti haleellaa xiyyaara maleeyyuu (drone) raawwatteetti. Gochi kun walitti bu'iinsa biyyoota lamaanii fi gara fuulduraatti bal'achuu isaa agarsiisa.

title: US bombs Iran for eighth-straight night
english: The United States military has conducted airstrikes against Iran for the eighth consecutive night. This action follows a fatal attack by Iranian forces in Jordan that resulted in the deaths of two American soldiers. President Donald Trump described these retaliatory strikes as a rapid and direct response to the loss of US troops.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይሎች ኢራን ላይ ለስምንተኛ ተከታታይ ቀን የአየር ጥቃት መፈጸማቸውን አስታውቀዋል። ይህ እርምጃ የተወሰደው በዮርዳኖስ በኢራን ጥቃት ምክንያት ሁለት የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች ከተገደሉ በኋላ ነው። ፕሬዚዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ እነዚህን የአጸፋ ጥቃቶች ለወታደሮቹ ህልፈት የተወሰደ ፈጣን እርምጃ ሲሉ ገልጸዋቸዋል።
oromo: Humnooni waraana Ameerikaa guyyaa saddeettif walitti aansuudhaan Iran irratti haleellaa qilleensa irraa raawwataniiru. Tarkaanfiin kun kan fudhatame erga waraanni Iran Yordaanos keessatti haleellaa raawwataniin loltoonni Ameerikaa lama du'anii boodadha. Preezidaant Donald Traamp haleellaa kana du'a loltootaa kanaaf deebii hatattamaa ta'uu ibsaniiru.

title: Moment Iranian missiles hit airbase in Jordan killing US soldiers
english: A missile launched by Iran struck the Muwaffaq Salti Airbase in Jordan, resulting in the deaths of two American soldiers and injuring four others. This incident is part of an ongoing conflict between the United States and Iran that began in February. Since the start of these hostilities, at least 16 US military personnel have lost their lives.
amharic: ኢራን በፈጸመችው የሚሳኤል ጥቃት በዮርዳኖስ በሚገኘው ሙዋፋቅ ሳልቲ የአየር ማረፊያ ላይ ሁለት የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች ሲገደሉ አራት ተጨማሪ ወታደሮች ቆስለዋል። ይህ ጥቃት በየካቲት ወር በአሜሪካ እና በኢራን መካከል ከተጀመረው ግጭት አንዱ አካል ነው። ከዚህ ግጭት መጀመሪያ አንስቶ ቢያንስ 16 የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች ህይወታቸውን አጥተዋል።
oromo: Iraaniin miilaa'ela dhukaasteen buufata xiyyaaraa Muwaffaq Salti kan Yordaanos keessatti argamu rukutteeti, kunis loltoota Ameerikaa lama galaafatee afur immoo maysuusa godhe. Miidhaan kun waraana Ameerikaafi Iraan gidduutti gaafa Guraandhala jalqabame keessatti kan dhalatedha. Waraana kana keessatti hanga ammaatti loltoonni Ameerikaa yoo xiqqaate 16 du'aniiru.

title: At least one killed as Russian ballistic missiles hit Kyiv
english: A Russian ballistic missile attack early Sunday targeted Kyiv and its surrounding areas, resulting in the death of at least one individual. The strikes caused significant destruction, including fires at residential buildings and a supermarket, and left nine people wounded. Air raid sirens were activated throughout the capital as emergency services responded to the damage.
amharic: እሁድ ዕለት ማለዳ በዩክሬን ዋና ከተማ ኪየቭ እና አካባቢዋ በተፈጸመ የሩሲያ የባለስቲክ ሚሳይል ጥቃት ቢያንስ አንድ ሰው መሞቱን እና ዘጠኝ ሰዎች መቁሰላቸውን መረጃዎች ያመለክታሉ። ጥቃቱ በመኖሪያ ቤቶች እና በሱፐርማርኬት ላይ እሳት እንዲነሳ ያደረገ ሲሆን በከተማዋ አቀፍ የሳይረን ማስጠንቀቂያዎች ተሰምተዋል። የነፍስ አድን ሰራተኞች በቦታው በመገኘት የተጎዱትን ለማገዝ ጥረት አድርገዋል።
oromo: Dilbata ganama magaalaa Kiyivii fi naannoo ishee irratti xiyyaara kombuutaraan hoogganamuun ykn 'ballistic missile' biyya Raashiyaan miidhaan gahuu isaa gabaafameera. Haleellaa kanaan yoo xiqqaate namni tokko lubbuun isaa darbee, namoonni sagal ammoo miidhamaniiru. Haleellaan kun manneen jireenyaa fi suuqii gurgurtaa irratti ibiddii kan kaasise yoo ta'u, magaalaattii keessa guutuu sagaleen akeekkachiisaa dhaga'ameera.

title: Aragchi says ‘personal remarks’ should not affect Iran-Iraq relations
english: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi recently spoke with his Iraqi counterpart to emphasize that unofficial, individual comments should not undermine the strong strategic partnership between their two nations. The two officials also reviewed current regional tensions caused by recent U.S. military strikes. Araghchi reaffirmed that the connection between Iran and Iraq remains deeply rooted in their shared history, culture, and mutual interests.
amharic: የኢራን የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትር አባስ አራግቺ ከኢራቅ አቻቸው ጋር ባደረጉት የስልክ ውይይት፣ ግለሰባዊ እና ይፋዊ ያልሆኑ አስተያየቶች በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል ያለውን ስትራቴጂያዊ ግንኙነት ሊጎዱ እንደማይገባ ገልጸዋል። በውይይታቸውም አሜሪካ በኢራን ላይ የፈጸመችውን ጥቃት እና ተያያዥ የቀጠናውን ወቅታዊ ሁኔታዎች ተወያይተዋል። አራግቺ የኢራን እና የኢራቅ ግንኙነት በታሪክ፣ በባህል እና በጋራ ጥቅሞች ላይ የተመሰረተ ጥልቅ መሠረት ያለው መሆኑን አረጋግጠዋል።
oromo: Ministirri Dhimma Alaa Iraan Abbas Araagchi hiriyyaa isaanii kan Iraaq waliin bilbilan haasaaafi, yaada namoota dhuunfaa irraa ka'uun hariiroo biyyoota lamaanii kan hin miine ta'uu qabu jechuun ibsaniiru. Ministirtoonni lamaan kun miidhaa waraana Ameerikaan Iraan irratti geessifte fi haala naannoo amma jiru irratti mari'ataniiru. Araagchi hariiroon Iraani fi Iraaq seenaa, aadaa fi faayidaa waliinii irratti kan hundaa'eefi kan cimaa ta'uu isaas mirkaneessaniiru.

title: Morning recap
english: The United States conducted its eighth recent strike against Iranian-linked targets following an attack that resulted in American casualties in Jordan. In response, Iranian officials have condemned the US actions, threatening a severe military retaliation while Iranian forces simultaneously engaged in drone operations against bases in Kuwait. Meanwhile, the US government has issued a global safety warning for its citizens due to the escalating instability and violence across the Middle East.
amharic: አሜሪካ በዮርዳኖስ በደረሰው ጥቃት የዜጎቿ ህይወት ማለፉን ተከትሎ በኢራን ኢላማዎች ላይ ስምንተኛውን ተከታታይ የአየር ጥቃት ፈጽማለች። የኢራን ባለስልጣናት ይህንን ድርጊት በማውገዝ ጠንካራ ወታደራዊ ምላሽ እንደሚሰጡ ያስጠነቀቁ ሲሆን፣ በአሁኑ ወቅት በኩዌት በሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ሰፈሮች ላይም የድሮን ጥቃቶችን አድርሰዋል። በሌላ በኩል፣ በአካባቢው እየጨመረ የመጣውን ውጥረት ተከትሎ አሜሪካ በዓለም ዙሪያ ለሚገኙ ዜጎቿ ከፍተኛ ጥንቃቄ እንዲያደርጉ አስገንዝባለች።
oromo: Amerikaa, loltoonni ishee Yordaanos keessatti miidhamuu hordofee, altii saddeettaffaadhaaf gara Iranitti tarkaanfii waraanaa fudhatteetti. Mootummaan Iran tarkaanfii kana balaaleffachuun deebii cimaa waraanaa akka kennu erga doorsisee booda, qubata waraana Amerikaa kan Kuweet keessa jiran irratti haleellaa doonii (drone) gaggeesseera. Gama biraatiin, waldhabdeen fi tasgabbii dhabuun biyyoota Baha Giddu-galeessaa keessatti dabaluu isaa hordofee, mootummaan Amerikaa lammiilee isaa guutuu addunyaa irra jiran maraaf akeekkachiisa of-eeggannoo dabarseera.

title: Lebanese president hopes to generate pressure on Israel during US trip
english: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun is visiting the White House to meet with Donald Trump, marking the first such trip by a Lebanese leader in two decades. He aims to persuade the U.S. to pressure Israel into withdrawing its forces from southern Lebanon as part of a previous agreement. Aoun also intends to present a strategy for disarming Hezbollah, despite the group's ongoing resistance to government authority and negotiations.
amharic: የሊባኖሱ ፕሬዝዳንት ጆሴፍ አውን ከሁለት አስርት ዓመታት በኋላ ለመጀመሪያ ጊዜ ወደ ዋይት ሀውስ በማቅናት ከፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ ጋር እየተወያዩ ነው። የጉብኝታቸው ዋና ዓላማ እስራኤል ከሊባኖስ ደቡባዊ ክፍል እንድትወጣ አሜሪካ ተጽዕኖ እንድታሳድር መጠየቅ ነው። በተጨማሪም የሊባኖስ መንግስት ሄዝቦላን ትጥቅ ለማስፈታት ያቀደውን እቅድ ለትራምፕ እንደሚያቀርቡ ይጠበቃል።
oromo: Pireezidaantiin Libaanoos Jooseef Aawun waggaa digdama keessatti yeroo jalqabaaf gara Waayit Hawus deemuun pireezidaant Doolaard Traamp waliin mari'achaa jiru. Kaayyoon guddaan imala isaanii kun, Israa'el loltoota ishee kibba Libaanoos irraa akka baastuuf Ameerikaan dhiibbaa akka gootu gaafachuu dha. Kana malees, gamtaan Heezbollaah hidhannoo hiikkatee nagayaan akka jiraatuuf tooftaa mootummaan qopheesse Traampitti dhiyeessuuf karoorfataniiru.

title: Israeli military closes area around Gaza ahead of settler march, report says
english: The Israeli military has restricted access to areas near Gaza in anticipation of a planned protest march by a right-wing settler group. This group aims to advocate for the re-establishment of Israeli settlements within the Gaza Strip, two decades after they were previously dismantled. Authorities declared the region a closed military zone as the march was set to begin from the Yad Mordechai area.
amharic: የእስራኤል ወታደራዊ ኃይል በጋዛ ድንበር አቅራቢያ የሚገኙ አካባቢዎችን በወታደራዊ ቁጥጥር ስር ውለዋል። ይህም የሆነው በጽንፈኛ የአይሁድ ሰፋሪዎች ቡድን ታቅዶ የነበረውን ሰልፍ ለመከላከል ሲሆን፣ ቡድኑ ከሃያ ዓመታት በኋላ በጋዛ ሰርጥ ውስጥ ሰፈራቸውን እንደገና ለመመስረት ይፈልጋል። የሰልፉ አዘጋጆች የያድ ሞርዴካይ አካባቢን እንደ መነሻ ተጠቅመው ሰልፋቸውን ለማካሄድ አቅደው ነበር።
oromo: Waraanni Israa'el naannoo daangaa Gaazaatti argamu akka lafa waraanaatti labsuun sochiin akka hin jiraanne dhorkeera. Tarkaanfiin kun kan fudhatame gareen warra qe'ee buqqa'anii deebi'anii qubachuu barbaadan hiriira waan qopheessaniifidha. Gareen kun waggoota digdama booda Gaaza keessatti qubannaa Israa'el deebisanii dhaabuuf kaayyeffatanii hiriira kana eegaluuf karoorfatanii turan.

title: Emergency services on alert in Iran's earthquake-hit Khuzestan
english: A magnitude 5 earthquake struck Iran's Khuzestan province earlier today, prompting local authorities to mobilize emergency rescue teams. Officials report that there are currently no signs of injuries or major property destruction. Assessment crews are actively surveying the affected area to ensure public safety.
amharic: የ5 ማግኒቱድ የመሬት መንቀጥቀጥ በዛሬው ዕለት የኢራኑን ሁዚስታን ግዛት መታ ሲሆን፣ የአካባቢው ባለስልጣናት የአደጋ ጊዜ የነፍስ አድን ቡድኖችን ወደ ስፍራው አሰማርተዋል። እስካሁን በደረሰው መረጃ መሰረት ምንም አይነት የሰው ህይወት መጥፋት ወይም የንብረት ውድመት አልተመዘገበም። የጉዳቱን መጠን ለመለየት ባለሙያዎች በስፍራው ምርመራ እያደረጉ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Guyyaa har'aa sochiin lafaa hamma 5 ta'e naannoo Khuzestan kan biyya Iraan keessatti mudateera. Mootummaan naannichaa gargaarsa ariifachiisaa fi gareewwan lubba baraartotaa qophii ta'anii akka eegan ajajeera. Hanga ammatti namni miidhame ykn qabeenyi manca'e hin jiru; ta'us gareewwan ogeeyyotaa miidhaan gahuu isaa mirkaneessuuf qorannoo geggeessaa jiru.

title: Andrew Tate and brother arrested in US after more charges laid against them in UK
english: Influencer Andrew Tate and his brother Tristan have been detained in the United States following a request from British authorities. The UK Crown Prosecution Service has filed new serious charges against the pair, including multiple counts of rape and sex trafficking, based on incidents reported between 2010 and 2017. While the brothers' legal team denies the allegations and labels the case a politically motivated attack, the US government is moving forward with formal extradition proceedings.
amharic: ታዋቂው ኢንፍሉዌንሰር አንድሪው ታይት እና ወንድሙ ትሪስታን በብሪታንያ ባለስልጣናት ጥያቄ መሰረት በአሜሪካ በቁጥጥር ስር ውለዋል። የብሪታንያ የዐቃቤ ህግ ቢሮ በሁለቱ ወንድማማቾች ላይ በ2010 እና 2017 መካከል በተፈጸሙ የጾታ ጥቃት እና የሰዎች ዝውውር ወንጀሎች ተጨማሪ ክሶችን መስርቷል። የሁለቱ ወንድማማቾች ጠበቆች ክሱ ፖለቲካዊ መሰረት ያለው ነው በማለት ክህደታቸውን ቢገልጹም፣ የአሜሪካ መንግስት ወደ ብሪታንያ የሚያደርሰውን የርክክብ ሂደት ጀምሯል።
oromo: Influencer Andrew Tate fi obboleessi isaa Tristan gaaffii qaamolee seeraa biyya Ingiliizii bu'uura godhachuun Ameerikaatti qabamaniiru. Abbaan alangaa biyya Ingiliizii dhimmoota bara 2010 hanga 2017 gidduutti raawwataman jedhaman kanneen akka dirqisiisuu fi nama gurguruu irratti hundaa'uun himata haaraa irratti bananiiru. Gareen abukaattotaa obboloota kanaa himatichi kan siyaasaa ti jechuun kan haalan yoo ta'u, mootummaan Ameerikaas gara Ingiliizitti isaan erguuf adeemsa seeraa jalqabeera.

title: US hits Iran for eighth consecutive night, Iran returns fire on Gulf bases
english: For the eighth night in a row, the United States conducted military strikes against Iranian locations to retaliate for a recent attack on a US base in Jordan that killed two American soldiers. The US stated these operations aim to weaken Iran's capacity to disrupt shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. In response, the Iranian military launched its own strikes targeting American assets located at two bases in Kuwait.
amharic: አሜሪካ በዮርዳኖስ በሚገኘው ጣቢያዋ ላይ በደረሰባት ጥቃት ሁለት ወታደሮቿ በመገደላቸው ምክንያት ለስምንተኛ ተከታታይ ቀን በኢራን ላይ የአየር ድብደባ ፈጽማለች። አሜሪካ ጥቃቱ የኢራንን የሆርሙዝ ባህር ሰላጤ የመርከብ እንቅስቃሴ የማስተጓጎል አቅም ለመቀነስ ያለመ መሆኑን ገልጻለች። በምላሹም የኢራን ወታደራዊ ኃይል በኩዌት በሚገኙ ሁለት የአሜሪካ የጦር ሰፈሮች ላይ ጥቃት መፈጸሙን አስታውቋል።
oromo: Amerikaa buufata isheen Yordanos keessatti qabdu irratti haleellaa gaheefi loltoonni ishee lama ajjeefamuun walqabatee, guyyaa saddeetffaaf itti fufinsaan Iiraan irratti haleellaa qilleensa irraa raawwatteetti. Amerikaan haleellaan kun dandeettii Iiraan daandii galaana Hormuz keessatti geejjiba galaanaaf gufuu ta'u hir'isuuf akka ta'e ibsiteetti. Iiraan ammoo, deebii haleellaa kanaatiin buufataalee Amerikaa kanneen Kuweet keessatti argaman lama irratti haleellaa raawwachuu ishee beeksifteetti.

title: Somalia races to save Radio Mogadishu’s fading archive
english: A dedicated team in Somalia is working urgently to digitize 400,000 hours of historical audio recordings from Radio Mogadishu. These tapes, which date back to the 1950s, represent a vital archive of Somali music, culture, and political history that is currently at risk of being lost forever due to tape deterioration. The project aims to preserve these national treasures and eventually make them accessible to the general public.
amharic: በሶማሊያ የሚገኝ አንድ ቡድን በሬዲዮ ሞቃዲሾ የሚገኙ የ400,000 ሰዓታት የቆዩ የድምፅ ቅጂዎችን ወደ ዲጂታል ለመቀየር በአስቸኳይ እየሰራ ነው። ከ1950ዎቹ ጀምሮ የነበሩት እነዚህ ካሴቶች የሶማሊያን ሙዚቃ፣ ባህል እና ታሪክ የያዙ ሲሆን፣ የካሴቶቹ መበላሸት የሀገሪቱን ታሪክ አደጋ ላይ ጥሎታል። የዚህ ፕሮጀክት ዋና ዓላማ እነዚህን ብሄራዊ ቅርሶች ጠብቆ ማቆየት እና ለወደፊቱ ለህዝብ ክፍት ማድረግ ነው።
oromo: Garee Somaliyatti argamu tokko sagantaa raadiyoo Mogadishoo irraa qophiilee seena qabeessa ta'an sa'aatii 400,000 ol ta'an gara dijitaalaatti jijjiiruuf tattaaffii cimaa gochaa jira. Kaaseettiin jaarraa 20ffaa keessa qophaa'an kunneen aadaa, muuziqaa fi seenaa Somaaliyaa kan of keessatti hammatedha; garuu yeroo ammaa kaaseettonni kunneen manca'uuf waan jiraniif qabachuun dirqama ta'eera. Kaayyoon hojii kanaa seenaa biyyattii kana eeguu fi gara fuulduraatti ummataaf akka banamu gochuu dha.

title: Tate brothers arrested in Miami on rape and sex trafficking charges
english: Influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate were taken into custody in Miami following accusations of rape and human trafficking from UK authorities. The brothers are currently fighting a separate legal battle involving 21 charges. Prosecutors in the UK are now working to have the pair extradited to face these new claims.
amharic: አንድሪው እና ትሪስታን ታይት በተባሉ ታዋቂ የማህበራዊ ሚዲያ ተፅዕኖ ፈጣሪዎች ላይ የብሪታንያ ፖሊስ ባቀረበው የጾታዊ ጥቃት እና የሰዎች ዝውውር ወንጀል ተጠርጥረው ማያሚ ውስጥ በቁጥጥር ስር ውለዋል። ወንድማማቾቹ ቀደም ሲል በሌላ መዝገብ 21 ክሶች ተመስርተውባቸው በመከራከር ላይ ናቸው። የብሪታንያ አቃቤ ህግ ሁለቱን ግለሰቦች ለፍርድ ለማቅረብ ወደ እንግሊዝ እንዲወሰዱ ጥረት እያደረጉ ነው።
oromo: Obboleewwan bekamoo Andrew fi Tristan Tate jedhaman, qorannoo poolisii UK kan irratti banamee ture himata gudeeddii fi wal-gorgoddoo namaa irratti shakkamanii magaala Maayamiitti to'annoo jala oolan. Obboleewwan kun duraan himata biraa 21 irratti banamee qorannoo irra jiru. Abbaan alangaa biyya UK himata haaraa kanaan walqabatee obboleewwan kun gara UK akka ergaman carraaqqii gochaa jiru.

title: FIFA World Cup 2026 sees major increase in goals from outside the box
english: The 2026 FIFA World Cup witnessed a significant rise in long-range scoring, with the percentage of goals from outside the penalty area doubling compared to the previous tournament. Experts attribute this trend to teams using defensive strategies that crowd the penalty box, leaving players with few options other than shooting from distance. High-quality strikes from outside the box became a defining feature of the competition, as attackers found creative ways to bypass packed defensive lines.
amharic: የ2026ቱ የፊፋ የዓለም ዋንጫ ከቅጣት ምት ክልል ውጭ በሚያስቆጠሩ ግቦች ላይ ከፍተኛ ጭማሪ ታይቶበታል። ባለሙያዎች እንደሚናገሩት፣ ቡድኖች ተከላካዮቻቸውን ወደ ኋላ በመሳብ የግብ ክልላቸውን በመሙላታቸው አጥቂዎች ከሩቅ ለመምታት መገደዳቸው የዚህ አዝማሚያ ዋና ምክንያት ነው። በዚህ ውድድር የተመለከትናቸው በርካታ ድንቅ ግቦች ተጫዋቾች በተጨናነቀ የመከላከል መስመር መካከል ክፍተትን ለመፍጠር የወሰዷቸው የረጅም ርቀት ሙከራዎች ውጤት ናቸው።
oromo: Wancaa Addunyaa FIFA 2026 irratti gooliin iddoo adabaa alaatti galan dabaluun isaa hubatameera; kunis waldorgommii Qatar irratti ture waliin yoo ilaalamu dachaan kan guddateedha. Ogeeyyiin akka ibsanitti, gareewwan hedduun ittisa cimaa uumuuf naannoo goolii isaanii cufuun isaa, weerartoonni akka dirqamanitti karaa fagoo akka yaalan godheera. Gooliin gurguddaan fi miiraan galan kun, weerartoonni ittisa garee mormituu keessatti bakka dhabanitti karaa biraa gariin goolii galchuuf carraaqqii godhan irraa kan dhufe ta'uun ibsameera.

title: ‘Spanish style’ wins over New York’s die-hard World Cup fans ahead of final
english: As the World Cup final approaches, New York City has seen a surge of support for the Spanish national team. Local venues like the Spanish Benevolent Society and Mercado Little Spain are packed with fans drawn to the team's impressive performance and the leadership of coach Luis de la Fuente. While other teams may have more fans in the city, the Spanish supporters are celebrated for their intense and long-standing dedication.
amharic: የአለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ እየቀረበ ሲመጣ፣ በኒውዮርክ ከተማ ለስፔን ብሄራዊ ቡድን ያላቸው ደጋፊዎች ቁጥር በከፍተኛ ሁኔታ ጨምሯል። እንደ ስፓኒሽ በኔቮለንት ሶሳይቲ ያሉ ስፍራዎች በቡድኑ አቋም እና በአሰልጣኝ ሉዊስ ደ ላ ፈንቴ አመራር የተደነቁ ደጋፊዎች ተሞልተዋል። ምንም እንኳን ሌሎች ቡድኖች በከተማዋ ብዙ ደጋፊዎች ቢኖራቸውም፣ የስፔን ደጋፊዎች ባላቸው ጠንካራ እና የቆየ ፍቅር ይታወቃሉ።
oromo: Xumura Waancaa Addunyaa gahuun walqabatee, magaalaa Niyoork keessatti deggertoonni garee ispoortii Ispeen baay'achaa jiru. Bakkeewwan akka Spanish Benevolent Society tti deggertoonni tapha gaarii garee isaanii fi hogganummaa leenjisaa Luis de la Fuente irraa kan ka'e walitti qabamaniiru. Gareewwan biroon magaalaa sana keessatti deggertoota hedduu qabaatanis, deggertoonni Ispeen jaalala cimaa fi dheeraa garee isaaniif qabaniin adda baafamu.

title: Adverse Opinions Pile Up as Addis Abeba’s Budget Hits a Record
english: A recent audit of the Addis Abeba City Administration revealed that various bureaus are holding onto billions of Birr in uncollected or unpaid funds. Although the city managed a record budget of over 233 billion Birr for the 2024/25 fiscal year, these accounting gaps highlight significant inefficiencies. This failure to process financial transactions effectively has led to widespread criticism regarding the management of public funds.
amharic: የአዲስ አበባ ከተማ አስተዳደር ባደረገው የኦዲት ምርመራ የተለያዩ ቢሮዎች ያልተሰበሰበ ወይም ያልተከፈለ በቢሊዮን የሚቆጠር ብር በእጃቸው እንደሚገኝ ተጋልጧል። ከተማዋ ለ2017 በጀት ዓመት ከ233 ቢሊዮን ብር በላይ ክብረ ወሰን የያዘ በጀት ያቀደች ቢሆንም፣ የሂሳብ አያያዝ ክፍተቶች የገንዘብ አጠቃቀሙን አዳክመውታል። ይህ የፋይናንስ እንቅስቃሴ አለመኖር በከተማዋ በጀት አጠቃቀም ላይ ከፍተኛ ትችቶችን አስነስቷል።
oromo: Qorannoon bulchiinsa magaalaa Finfinnee irratti taasifame tokko, waajjirreen gara garaa qarshii biliyoonaan lakkaa'amu kan hin sassaabamne ykn kan hin kaffalamne qabatanii akka jiran mirkaneesseera. Magaalaan kun bara baajata 2017 keessa qarshii biliyoona 233 ol kan ta'e baajata seena-qabeessa ta'e qabaattus, hanqinni sirna herregaa kun akkaataa itti fayyadama maallaqaa irratti rakkoo guddaa uumeera. Qulqullina dhabuun tajaajila faayinaansii kanaas hoggansa qabeenya mootummaa irratti komii cimaa uumeera.

title: A Sack of Cement, with the Chain No One Can See
english: Cement prices in Ethiopia are highly volatile due to a lack of transparency in the distribution chain. Intermediaries currently dominate the market, inflating costs for retailers and contractors while manufacturers and government officials deflect responsibility for the instability. This situation creates a difficult environment for traders and construction businesses trying to manage their operations.
amharic: በኢትዮጵያ የሲሚንቶ ዋጋ በስርጭት ሰንሰለቱ ላይ በሚታየው ግልጽነት ማጣት ምክንያት ከፍተኛ መዋዠቅ እያሳየ ይገኛል። በአሁኑ ወቅት አማላጆች ገበያውን በመቆጣጠራቸው ለችርቻሮ ነጋዴዎችና ለኮንትራክተሮች ከፍተኛ ወጪ እየፈጠሩ ነው። አምራቾች እና የመንግስት አካላት ለዚህ የዋጋ ንረት እርስ በርስ መወቃቀሳቸው በዘርፉ የተሰማሩትን ባለሙያዎች ለችግር እየዳረገ ነው።
oromo: Gatiin simintoo Itoophiyaa keessatti tajaajila raabsuu irratti rakkoo iftoominaa jiruun kan ka’e jijjiirama cimaa agarsiisaa jira. Yeroo ammaa kanatti giddu-galeessitootni gabaa kana to’achuu isaaniitiin gatiin simintoo daldaltoota xixiqqoo fi kontiraaktaroota irratti qaala’aa jira. Warshaaleen fi qaamoleen mootummaa rakkoo kanaaf wal komachuun isaanii daldaltootaa fi hojii ijaarsa irratti dhiibbaa uumaa jira.

title: Airports Lack Master Plans, Title Deeds
english: A recent audit by the Office of the Auditor General revealed that 22 airports managed by the Ethiopian Airlines Group are operating without essential master plans. Furthermore, several of these facilities lack official land-use documentation and legal title deeds. This indicates that the rapid expansion of airport infrastructure is currently outpacing necessary regulatory and safety planning.
amharic: የዋና ኦዲተር መሥሪያ ቤት ባደረገው አዲስ የኦዲት ግምገማ፣ በኢትዮጵያ አየር መንገድ ግሩፕ ስር የሚተዳደሩ 22 አየር ማረፊያዎች ተገቢ የሆነ የልማት ማስተር ፕላን እንደሌላቸው ታውቋል። ከዚህ በተጨማሪም፣ አንዳንዶቹ አየር ማረፊያዎች የቦታ መጠቀሚያ እቅድ ወይም ህጋዊ የይዞታ ማረጋገጫ ሰነድ የላቸውም። ይህም የአየር ማረፊያዎቹ ፈጣን መስፋፋት ለደህንነት እና ለታቀደለት የልማት ሂደት አስፈላጊ የሆኑ የቅድመ ዝግጅት ስራዎችን እያቀጨለ መሆኑን ያሳያል።
oromo: Odiitariin waliigalaa biyyattii qorannoo dhiyeenyaa taasise keessatti, buufataaleen xiyyaaraa 22 garee Itoophiyaa Aerlaayinsii jalatti bulan maastar pilaanii akka hin qabne mirkaneesseera. Kana malees, buufataaleen kunniin tokko tokko karoora fayyadama lafaa fi ragaa qabiyyee seera qabeessa ta'e kan hin qabne ta'uu ibsameera. Haalli kun babal'inni buufataalee xiyyaaraa saffisaan adeemaa jiru karooraa fi eegumsa bu'uuraa waliin wal gituu dhabuu isaa agarsiisa.

title: Parents Win, International Schools Lose Their Rulebook
english: A federal court has invalidated a recent Education Ministry amendment regarding school licensing, siding with 132 parents from Sandford International School. The judges determined that the Ministry overstepped its legal authority and failed to follow proper procedures when implementing the change. This ruling effectively blocks the school's attempt to justify controversial tuition hikes that had been under dispute for a year.
amharic: የፌደራል ከፍተኛ ፍርድ ቤት የትምህርት ሚኒስቴር የወጣውን የትምህርት ቤት ፈቃድ አሰጣጥ ማሻሻያ ህገ-ወጥ በማለት ውድቅ አድርጎታል። ይህ ውሳኔ የተላለፈው የሳንድፎርድ ኢንተርናሽናል ትምህርት ቤት ወላጆች ባቀረቡት ክስ ሲሆን፣ ሚኒስቴሩ ህጋዊ አሰራርን ሳይከተል ስልጣኑን አልፎ እንደሰራ ፍርድ ቤቱ አረጋግጧል። በዚህም መሰረት ወላጆች ለአንድ አመት ሲከራከሩበት የነበረውን አወዛጋቢ የትምህርት ክፍያ ጭማሪ ማክሸፍ ችለዋል።
oromo: Mana murtii federaalaatti, jijjiirraa seeraa Ministeerri Barnootaa kenna hayyama mana barumsaa ilaalchisee baase seeraan alaa ta'uu isaa murteesseera. Murtiin kun kan darbe himata warra barattoota mana barumsaa saandfoordii 132 tiin yoo ta'u, ministeerichi aangoosaa akka darbe fi adeemsa sirrii hordofuu akka hin dandeenye mana murtichatti mirkanaa'eera. Murtiin kun, warri barattootaa waggaa tokkoof mormaa turan daballiin kaffaltii barumsaa gaggeeffame akka haqamu gochuudhaan injifannoo argataniiru.

title: Addis Abeba Plans to Move Its Money to the Wires
english: The Addis Abeba Finance Bureau is introducing a new policy to transition all municipal payments to an electronic platform to improve efficiency and reduce financial corruption. While this digitisation effort aims to streamline city services and increase transparency, experts have raised concerns about the risks of relying on a single bank and the lack of necessary infrastructure. The city government intends to replace half of its current manual payment processes with this centralized digital system.
amharic: የአዲስ አበባ ከተማ ፋይናንስ ቢሮ የከተማ አስተዳደሩን ክፍያዎች በሙሉ ወደ ዲጂታል ሥርዓት ለማዛወር የሚያስችል ረቂቅ መመሪያ አዘጋጅቷል። ይህ እርምጃ የአገልግሎት አሰጣጥን ለማቀላጠፍ እና የገንዘብ ብክነትን ለመከላከል ያለመ ነው። ይሁን እንጂ ባለሙያዎች ሥርዓቱ በአንድ ባንክ ላይ ብቻ መደገፉን እና የከተማዋ መሠረተ ልማት ዝግጁ አለመሆኑን በመጥቀስ ስጋታቸውን ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Biiroon Maallaqaa magaalaa Finfinnee kaffaltiiwwan bulchiinsa magaalaa hunda gara sirna dijitaalaatti jijjiiruuf qophii irra jira. Tarkaanfiin kun tajaajila si’ata qabu kennuufi hatamuu maallaqaa ittisuuf kan gargaaru dha. Haa ta’u malee, ogeeyyiin akka jedhanitti, sirni kun baankii tokko qofa irratti kan hirkatuufi magaalattiin ammoo humna teeknoolojii gahaa waan hin qabneef rakkoo uumuu danda’a.

title: Russians turn to cash, putting more strain on slowing wartime economy
english: Russian citizens are increasingly using physical cash due to frequent mobile internet outages caused by drone attacks and a general sense of economic insecurity. This shift toward cash transactions is hindering the government's ability to collect taxes, which is problematic as the country faces a growing budget deficit. Meanwhile, small businesses are also favoring cash payments to avoid higher taxes and survive in a slowing wartime economy.
amharic: በዩክሬን ጦርነት ሳቢያ በተደጋጋሚ በሚከሰቱ የኢንተርኔት መቆራረጦች እና በኢኮኖሚው አለመረጋጋት ምክንያት የሩሲያ ዜጎች በጥሬ ገንዘብ የመጠቀም ልምዳቸው እየጨመረ ነው። ይህ ሁኔታ መንግስት ከግብር ገቢ ለመሰብሰብ እንዲቸገር በማድረጉ ለጦርነቱ የሚያስፈልገውን በጀት ለመሸፈን አዳጋች ሆኗል። በተጨማሪም አነስተኛ የንግድ ተቋማት ከፍ ያለ ግብርን ለማስቀረት እና በጦርነቱ የተዳከመውን ኢኮኖሚ ለመቋቋም በጥሬ ገንዘብ የሚደረጉ ክፍያዎችን እያበረታቱ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Sababa weerara doonii fi rakkoo interneetii yeroo gara yerootti mudatuun akkasumas soda dinagdee biyyattii irraa kan ka'e, lammiileen Ruusiyaa gara fayyadama maallaqa harkaa (cash) tti deebi'aa jiru. Jijjiiramni kun mootummaan gibira akka hin sassaabne gufuu ta'uun, baajata waraanaaf barbaachisu argachuun akka itti ulfaatu godheera. Gama biraatiin, qonnaan bultoonni fi daldaltoonni xixiqqoon gibira ol'aanaa of irraa ittisuuf akkasumas dinagdee waraanaan miidhame keessatti of dabarsuuf jedhanii hojiin isaanii maallaqa harkaa irratti akka hundaa'u gochaa jiru.

title: Exiled Cuban artist Otero Alcantara has arrived in US, Rubio confirms
english: Renowned Cuban artist and activist Luis Manuel Otero Alcantara has moved to the United States following five years of imprisonment for his political opposition. US Secretary of State Marco Rubio confirmed his arrival and used the occasion to demand the release of over 700 other political prisoners currently held in Cuba. Otero Alcantara is a key figure in the San Isidro Movement, a group that has long faced government suppression due to its advocacy for increased freedom in the country.
amharic: ታዋቂው የኩባ አርቲስት እና አክቲቪስት ሉዊስ ማኑኤል ኦቴሮ አልካንታራ በመንግስት ላይ በመቃወማቸው ለአምስት ዓመታት ታስረው ከቆዩ በኋላ ወደ አሜሪካ መግባታቸው ተረጋግጧል። የአሜሪካ የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትር ማርኮ ሩቢዮ የደረሱበትን ሁኔታ በማረጋገጥ በኩባ እስር ቤት ውስጥ የሚገኙ ከ700 በላይ የፖለቲካ እስረኞች በአስቸኳይ እንዲለቀቁ ጠይቀዋል። ኦቴሮ አልካንታራ በኩባ ውስጥ ነፃነትን እንዲሰፍን የሚታገለው የሳን ኢሲድሮ ንቅናቄ መሥራች ሲሆን፣ በሃገሪቱ መንግሥት ሲደርስባቸው የነበረውን ጫና ተቋቁመው አሁን በስደት ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Artistii fi falmaa mirga namoomaa biyya Kuba kan ta'e Luis Manuel Otero Alcantara, mormii mootummaa isaatiin walqabatee waggaa shan guutuu hidhamuun erga turee booda gara Ameerikaa seeneera. Ministirri Dhimma Alaa Ameerikaa Marko Ruubiyoon galuu isaa mirkaneessuun, amma yoonaatti biyya Kubaatti kan hidhaman hidhamtoonni siyaasaa 700 ol ta'an akka gadhiifaman gaafataniiru. Otero Alcantara dhaabbata 'San Isidro Movement' jedhamu kan mirga namoomaaf falmu hundeessuun beekama; gareen kunis mirga dabalataa gaafachuu isaatiin mootummaa Kubaatiin yeroo dheeraaf cunqursaa irra tureera.

title: A giant cake for Venezuelan quake child survivors as death toll passes 5000
english: Volunteers have organized a giant cake event to help lift the spirits of 3,000 children displaced by the recent, devastating twin earthquakes in Venezuela. The disaster has resulted in over 5,000 deaths and left nearly 2 million people, including hundreds of thousands of children, in urgent need of assistance. This gesture serves as a brief moment of comfort amidst the massive humanitarian crisis currently unfolding in the country.
amharic: በቬንዙዌላ በተከሰተው ከፍተኛ የመሬት መንቀጥቀጥ ምክንያት ለተፈናቀሉ 3,000 ህጻናት በጎ ፈቃደኞች ግዙፍ ኬክ በማዘጋጀት የሞራል ድጋፍ አድርገዋል። አደጋው ከ5,000 በላይ ሰዎችን ህይወት የቀጠፈ ሲሆን ወደ 1.8 ሚሊዮን የሚጠጉ ሰዎች፣ ከእነዚህም ውስጥ 680,000 የሚሆኑት ህጻናት፣ አስቸኳይ የሰብአዊ እርዳታ ያስፈልጋቸዋል። ይህ ድርጊት በአገሪቱ እየተከሰተ ባለው ከባድ የሰብአዊ ቀውስ መሃል ለህጻናቱ ትንሽም ብትሆን መጽናኛ ለመስጠት ያለመ ነው።
oromo: Venezuela keessatti balaa sochii lafaa cimaa mudateen kanneen buqqa'an ijoollee 3,000 ta'aniif, namoonni fedhiin hojjetan keekii guddaa tokko qopheessuun isaan jajjabeessaniiru. Balaan kun lubbuu namoota 5,000 ol kan galaafate yoo ta'u, namoonni miliyoona 1.8 ta'an, kanneen keessaa ijoolleen 680,000 ta'an gargaarsa namoomaa ariifachiisaa barbaadu. Gochi kun balaa gurguddaa biyyattii keessatti mudate kana keessatti ijoollee kanaaf tasgabbii xinnoo tokko kennuuf kan yaadameedha.

title: Netanyahu declares support for Argentina ahead of World Cup final
english: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has announced his support for the Argentine national football team ahead of their World Cup final match. The gesture followed a meeting where Argentina's ambassador to Israel gifted him a team jersey. Netanyahu highlighted his strong diplomatic ties with Argentine President Javier Milei as part of his reasoning for backing the team.
amharic: የእስራኤል ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ቤንጃሚን ኔታንያሁ የዓለም ዋንጫ የፍጻሜ ጨዋታን አስመልክቶ ለአርጀንቲና ብሄራዊ ቡድን ድጋፋቸውን ገልጸዋል። ይህ የሆነው የአርጀንቲና አምባሳደር ለጠቅላይ ሚኒስትሩ የቡድኑን ማሊያ በስጦታ ካበረከቱ በኋላ ነው። ኔታንያሁ ከአርጀንቲናው ፕሬዝዳንት ከሀቪየር ሚሌይ ጋር ያላቸው መልካም ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ግንኙነት ለዚህ ድጋፍ እንደ ምክንያት አድርገው አንስተዋል።
oromo: Mummichi Ministiraa Israa'el Benjamin Netanyahu tapha xumuraa Waancaa Addunyaarratti garee kubbaa miillaa Arjentiinaaf deggersa qaban ibsaniiru. Kun kan ta'e ambaasaaddarri Arjentiinaa biyyattii Israa'elitti argaman maaliyyaa garee sanaa erga isaaniif kennanii boodadha. Netanyahu deggersa kana kan ibsan, pirezidaantii Arjentiinaa Javier Milei waliin hariiroo cimaa qaban eeruudhaani.

title: Iran war live: US launches new strikes; Trump mourns killed soldiers
english: The United States has initiated new military strikes against Iran for the eighth night in a row following the deaths of two American soldiers in Jordan. President Trump expressed sorrow over the loss of the service members while reiterating his firm commitment to preventing Iran from acquiring nuclear weapons. These actions mark a significant escalation in ongoing tensions between the two nations.
amharic: በጆርዳን በተፈጸመ ጥቃት ሁለት የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች መገደላቸውን ተከትሎ፣ አሜሪካ በኢራን ላይ ለስምንተኛ ተከታታይ ምሽት አዲስ የአየር ጥቃት ሰንዝራለች። ፕሬዝዳንት ትራምፕ የሁለቱን ወታደሮች ሞት በማዘን፣ ኢራን የኑክሌር መሳሪያ እንዳታገኝ ለማድረግ ያላቸውን ጽኑ አቋም ገልጸዋል። ይህ ክስተት በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል ያለውን ውጥረት የበለጠ አባብሶታል።
oromo: Iordaanisitti haleellaa raawwatameen loltoonni Ameerikaa lama erga ajjeefamanii booda, Ameerikaan galgala saddeettaffaaf Iiraan irratti haleellaa haaraa bantee jirti. Pirezidaanti Traamp du'a loltoota kanaa irratti gadda guddaa kan ibsan yoo ta'u, Iiraan meeshaa niwukilaraa akka hin arganne ittisuuf kutannoo qaban mirkaneessaniiru. Gochi kun walitti bu'iinsa biyyoota lamaanii hammaataa akka adeemu taasiseera.

title: Saka hat-trick helps England down France to win World Cup 2026 Bronze Final
english: England defeated France 6-4 in a high-scoring third-place playoff match at the 2026 World Cup. Bukayo Saka secured a hat-trick for England, while Kylian Mbappé scored twice to become the all-time leading goalscorer in tournament history. Despite a second-half resurgence from France, England maintained their lead to secure the bronze medal.
amharic: እንግሊዝ በ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ የሦስተኛ ደረጃ አሸናፊነት ጨዋታ ፈረንሳይን 6 ለ 4 በማሸነፍ ነሐስ ሜዳሊያውን አግኝታለች። በጨዋታው ቡካዮ ሳካ ሶስት ግቦችን በማስቆጠር ድንቅ ብቃት ያሳየ ሲሆን፣ የፈረንሳዩ ኮከብ ኪሊያን ምባፔ ሁለት ግቦችን በማስቆጠር በዓለም ዋንጫ ታሪክ ብዙ ግቦችን ያስቆጠረ ተጫዋች መሆን ችሏል። ፈረንሳይ በሁለተኛው አጋማሽ ለመመለስ ጥረት ብታደርግም እንግሊዝ የጨዋታውን ውጤት አስጠብቃ መውጣት ችላለች።
oromo: Ingiliiziin tapha sadarkaa sadaffaa tapha waancaa addunyaa bara 2026 irratti Faransaay 6-4 injifachuun badhaasa nahaasaa argatteetti. Buukaayoo Saakaa qabxii sadii (hat-trick) galchuun seenaa hojjetee, Kiliyaan Embaappe immoo goolii lama lakkoofsiisuun goolii baay'ee seenaa waancaa addunyaa keessatti galche ta'uun isaa mirkanaa'eera. Faransaay gita lammaffaa irratti carraaqqii cimaa gootee yoo jette iyyuu, Ingiliiziin injifannoo ishee eeggattee xumuruu dandeesseetti.

title: Kylian Mbappe breaks all-time World Cup scoring record with 22nd goal
english: French captain Kylian Mbappe has set a new all-time World Cup scoring record by reaching 22 career goals. He achieved this milestone during a high-scoring third-place match against England, which concluded with a 6-4 victory for the English team in Miami. With this performance, Mbappe has secured 10 goals in the current tournament, positioning himself as the frontrunner for the Golden Boot award.
amharic: የፈረንሳይ ብሄራዊ ቡድን ካፒቴን ኪሊያን ኤምባፔ በዓለም ዋንጫ ታሪክ 22 ግቦችን በማስቆጠር አዲስ ክብረ ወሰን አስመዝግቧል። ይህንን ታሪካዊ ውጤት ያስመዘገበው ማያሚ ላይ ከእንግሊዝ ጋር በተደረገውና እንግሊዝ 6 ለ 4 ባሸነፈችበት የሶስተኛ ደረጃ ጨዋታ ላይ ነው። በዚህ ብቃት ኤምባፔ በአሁኑ ውድድር 10 ግቦችን በማስቆጠር ለወርቃማው ጫማ ሽልማት ቀዳሚ ተወዳዳሪ ሆኗል።
oromo: Kabajaa garee Faransaay kan ta'e Kiliyan Embaapee tapha waancaa addunyaa keessatti goolii 22 lakkoofsisuun seenaa haaraa galcheera. Galiiwwan kana kan lakkoofsisate tapha sadarkaa sadaffaa Maayaamitti Ingilizii wajjin godhameefi Ingilizii 6 fi 4 injifatte irratti. Akkaataa kanaan, Embaapeen tapha waancaa kanaa keessatti goolii 10 galchuun badhaasa 'Golden Boot' ykn kophee warqee fudhachuuf kutaannoo cimaa irratti argama.

title: Israeli settlers storm Palestinian homes in Hebron, steal sheep
english: Armed Israeli settlers, protected by military forces, raided Palestinian homes near Hebron on Saturday and stole livestock. During the attack, a young child required hospital treatment due to extreme trauma. A similar attempted theft in a nearby area was successfully prevented by local residents.
amharic: በሄብሮን አቅራቢያ የታጠቁ የእስራኤል ሰፋሪዎች በወታደሮች ታጅበው የፍልስጤማውያንን መኖሪያ ቤት በመውረር እንስሳትን ዘርፈዋል። ጥቃቱን ተከትሎ አንድ ህጻን ከፍተኛ ድንጋጤ እና መናድ ስለገጠመው ሆስፒታል ገብቷል። በሌላ አካባቢ በተመሳሳይ ለመዝረፍ የሞከሩ ሰፋሪዎች በአካባቢው ነዋሪዎች ተገደው ለቀዋል።
oromo: Godina Hebronitti, namoonni biyya Israa'el irraa dhufan kan meeshaa waraanaa hidhatan, loltootaan deeggaramanii mana jiraattota Paalastiyinii qe'eetti weeraruun horii hataniiru. Weerara kanaan ijoolleen tokko sodaachuu isaatiin miidhamanii hospitaala galaniiru. Naannoo biraatti immoo namoonni kunneen horii hatuuf yaalanii jiraattotaan qolatamanii akka deebi'an ta'eera.

title: Iran closes two border crossings with Kurdish region of Iraq
english: Iran has shut down two major border crossings connecting its Kurdistan province to Iraq's semi-autonomous Kurdistan region. Authorities have issued warnings for citizens to avoid frontier areas due to heightened security concerns. These actions follow a series of recent US military strikes in the region.
amharic: ኢራን ከኢራቅ ከፊል ራስ ገዝ የኩርድ ክልል ጋር የሚያገናኟትን ሁለት ዋና ዋና የድንበር መተላለፊያ መንገዶችን ዘግታለች። ባለስልጣናት የጸጥታ ስጋትን ተከትሎ ዜጎች በድንበር አካባቢ ከመንቀሳቀስ እንዲቆጠቡ አስጠንቅቀዋል። ይህ እርምጃ የተወሰደው በክልሉ በተከታታይ በተፈጸሙ የአሜሪካ የአየር ጥቃቶች ምክንያት ነው።
oromo: Iraaniin daangaa naannoo Kurdiistaan irraa gara naannoo Kurdiistaan kan Iraaq geessan karaawwan lama cuftee jirti. Mootummaan sodaa nageenyaa jiruuf lammiileen daangaa sana akka hin dhihaanne akeekkachiiseera. Tarkaanfiin kun kan fudhatame erga waraanni Ameerikaa naannichatti haleellaa geggeessuu jalqabee booda dha.

title: US launches new strikes on Iran after deaths of service members in Jordan
english: The United States military has initiated fresh airstrikes against Iranian targets following the deaths of American service members in Jordan. These operations aim to weaken Iran's capacity to disrupt maritime trade in the Strait of Hormuz. The strikes are also intended to serve as a direct retaliatory measure against the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps.
amharic: በጆርዳን የደረሰውን የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች ሞት ተከትሎ፣ አሜሪካ በኢራን ኢላማዎች ላይ አዲስ የአየር ድብደባ መፈጸም ጀምራለች። እነዚህ ጥቃቶች የኢራንን በሆርሙዝ የባህር በር የንግድ መርከቦች ላይ የሚያደርሱትን ስጋት ለመቀነስ የታቀዱ ናቸው። እንዲሁም እርምጃው በኢስላሚክ አብዮታዊ ዘበኛ ኃይል ላይ ፈጣን ቅጣት ለመጣል ያለመ ነው።
oromo: Humni waraana Ameerikaa waraana isaanii Yordaanos keessatti ajjeefamuu hordofuun, Iran irratti duula qilleensa irraa haaraa jalqabaniiru. Duulli kun dandeettii Iran daldala galaana irraa kanneen Hormuz keessa darban irratti miidhaa geessisuu dadhabsiisuuf kaayyeeffateera. Kana malees, tarkaanichi garee waraana Iran (Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps) irratti adabbii ariifataa kennuuf kan xiyyeeffate dha.

title: Trump says deaths of US service members ‘very sad’
english: President Donald Trump expressed his deep sadness regarding the recent deaths of two American soldiers caused by Iranian attacks. He honored their sacrifice while performing their duties for the nation. Additionally, he firmly declared that the United States is committed to preventing Iran from ever acquiring nuclear weapons.
amharic: ፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ በኢራን ጥቃት ምክንያት ሁለት አሜሪካዊያን ወታደሮች ህይወታቸው ማለፉ በእጅጉ እንዳሳዘናቸው ገልጸዋል። ለሀገራቸው ሲሉ መስዋዕትነት የከፈሉ ወታደሮችን በማስታወስ፣ ሀዘናቸውን ገልጸዋል። በተጨማሪም አሜሪካ ኢራን የኒውክሌር መሳሪያ እንዳታገኝ በማንኛውም ሁኔታ እንደምትከላከል አስታውቀዋል።
oromo: Pireezidaant Doolnaald Tiraamp haleellaa Iraan qaqqabsiiseen loltoonni Ameerikaa lama du'uun isaanii baay'ee akka isaan gaddisiise ibsaniiru. Loltoonni kunneen biyya isaaniif jecha lubbuu isaanii kan kennan ta'uu eeruun gadda isaanii ibsaniiru. Dabalataanis, Ameerikaan Iraan meeshaa niwukilaraa akka hin arganne guutummaatti ittisuuf murteessite akka jirtu ibsaniiru.

title: World Cup final tickets near $2.3m mark on FIFA’s resale platform
english: Ticket prices for the upcoming World Cup final in New Jersey have reached astronomical levels, with some resale listings hitting nearly $2.3 million. Despite initial concerns regarding high costs and travel challenges, the tournament has seen record-breaking demand and nearly full stadium capacity. This final match between Argentina and Spain serves as the peak of a successful event where fans consistently paid premium prices to attend.
amharic: በኒው ጀርሲ ለሚካሄደው የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ ጨዋታ የቲኬት ዋጋ እጅግ በጣም በመጨመር በአንዳንድ የዳግም ሽያጭ መድረኮች እስከ 2.3 ሚሊዮን ዶላር ደርሷል። የዋጋ መወደድ እና የጉዞ ተግዳሮቶች ቢኖሩም፣ የዘንድሮው የዓለም ዋንጫ ከፍተኛ ተወዳጅነትን በማትረፍ ስታዲየሞች በአብዛኛው ሙሉ በሙሉ ተሞልተው ነበር። በአርጀንቲና እና በስፔን መካከል የሚደረገው ይህ የመጨረሻ ጨዋታ፣ ደጋፊዎች ለጨዋታው ከፍተኛ ዋጋ ለመክፈል ፈቃደኛ የነበሩበትን ስኬታማ የውድድር ዘመን ይቋጫል።
oromo: Gatiin tikkeetii tapha xumuraa waancaa addunyaa kan Niiw Jersiitti godhamu daran dabalee, gabaa gurgurtaa irra deebii irratti hanga doolaara miliyoona 2.3 ga’eera. Gatiin mi’aawaa ta’uufi rakkooleen imalaa kan jiran ta’us, taphichi namoota hedduu harkisee fi iddoon taphaas guutumaan guututti namootaan ceepha’ameera. Taphi Arjentiinaa fi Ispeen gidduutti godhamu kun, taphni kun milkaa’ina guddaa akka argate fi taphattoonnis gatii olaanaa kaffaluuf fedhii akka qaban kan agarsiisuudha.

title: Cockroach Party protest intensifies after Wangchuk forcibly hospitalised
english: Protests led by the Cockroach Janta Party have escalated following the forced hospitalization of activist Sonam Wangchuk on the 21st day of his hunger strike. In a show of support, party leader Abhijeet Dipke began his own fast but was attacked with ink during the demonstration. These events have fueled growing tensions as activists continue to voice their dissent.
amharic: የኮክሮች ጃንታ ፓርቲ አክቲቪስት ሶናም ዋንግቹክ ለ21 ቀናት የዘለቀውን የረሃብ አድማ እያደረጉ በኃይል ወደ ሆስፒታል ከተወሰዱ በኋላ ተቃውሟቸውን አጠናክረዋል። የፓርቲው መስራች አብሂጄት ዲፕኬ ከአድማተኛው ጋር ለመቆም አድማ የጀመሩ ቢሆንም፣ በሰልፉ ወቅት በቀለም ተረጭተው ጥቃት ደርሶባቸዋል። እነዚህ ክስተቶች የተቃውሞ እንቅስቃሴው እንዲባባስ ምክንያት ሆነዋል።
oromo: Duula beekamaa Sonam Wangchuk guyyaa 21f gaggeessaa turan booda, humnan gara hospitaalaatti erguun isaanii mormii 'Cockroach Janta Party' cimsee jira. Hoggantuun paartichaa Abhijeet Dipke deggersa isaanii ibsuuf soomuuf yoo yaalan, yeroo mormii kanaatti dibata dhangalaasuun irratti weeraramee jira. Gochi kun mormiin kun caalaatti akka jabaatu taasisee jira.

title: Latin America unites to cheer against Argentina in FIFA World Cup final
english: In an unusual twist for the FIFA World Cup, fans across Latin America are setting aside regional loyalty to support Spain against Argentina in the upcoming final. Many supporters believe Argentina has received unfair assistance from referees and FIFA, leading them to view the team as favored rather than merit-based champions. Consequently, nations like Brazil, Mexico, and Colombia are actively rooting against Lionel Messi and his team to prevent them from securing another title.
amharic: በዘንድሮው የፊፋ የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ፣ ከላቲን አሜሪካ የሚገኙ አድናቂዎች ለክልላቸው ቡድን ድጋፍ ከመስጠት ይልቅ ስፔን አርጀንቲናን እንድትገጥም እየተመኙ ነው። ብዙዎች አርጀንቲና በዳኞችና በፊፋ በኩል አድልዎ የተደረገላት ቡድን እንደሆነች በማመን፣ የሊዮኔል ሜሲ ቡድን ዋንጫውን እንዳያነሳ ይፈልጋሉ። በዚህም ምክንያት ብራዚልን፣ ሜክሲኮንና ኮሎምቢያን ጨምሮ በርካታ ሀገራት በአርጀንቲና ላይ ተባብረው ስፔንን በመደገፍ ላይ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Waltajjii xumuraa waancaa addunyaa kan bara kanaatti, biyyoonni Ameerikaa Laatiin hedduun aadaa isaanii ganuun, biyya Arjantiinaa mormuudhaan ispeen akka moatu deggaraa jiru. Namoonni hedduun Arjantiinaan deggersa daayilootaa fi FIFA argachaa jirti jedhanii waan amannaniif, gareen Liyonel Mesii injifannoo akka hin arganne barbaadu. Kanaan walqabatee, biyyoonni akka Biraazil, Meksikoo fi Kolombiyaa, Arjantiinaan waancaa akka hin fudhanneef hundi isaanii gamtaan ispeen akka injifattuuf deggaraa jiru.

title: US defence secretary says deaths of US service members ‘stiffens our resolve‘
english: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth addressed the recent death of two American soldiers who were killed in Jordan by Iranian forces. He stated that these losses have only strengthened the commitment of the United States to its military goals. The government remains focused on its mission despite this tragedy.
amharic: የአሜሪካ መከላከያ ሚኒስትር ፒት ሄግሴዝ በዮርዳኖስ በኢራን ኃይሎች የተገደሉትን ሁለት የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች በተመለከተ መግለጫ ሰጥተዋል። እነዚህ የሞት አጋጣሚዎች የአገሪቱን ቁርጠኝነት ይበልጥ እንዳጠናከሩት ሚኒስትሩ ገልጸዋል። መንግስት በዚሁ አሳዛኝ ሁኔታ ውስጥም ቢሆን ተልዕኮውን ለማሳካት ትኩረት ሰጥቶ እየሰራ መሆኑን አስታውቀዋል።
oromo: Ministirri ittisa biyya Ameerikaa Piit Hegseeth, loltoota Ameerikaa lama kanneen biyya Yordaanos keessatti humnoota Iraaniin ajjeefaman ilaalchisee ibsa kennaniiru. Duuti loltoota kanaa murannoo Ameerikaan qabdu kan caalaatti jabeesse ta'uu ibsaniiru. Mootummaan balaa gaddisiisaa kana keessa iyyuu duula isaa itti fufuuf xiyyeeffannoo kennee akka jiru beekameera.

title: Israeli military kills Palestinian woman in Gaza
english: Israeli artillery fire in Gaza City's Zeitoun neighborhood resulted in the death of one Palestinian woman and left several others injured. This attack follows a series of military raids across the Gaza Strip that have claimed the lives of 24 people since yesterday. The ongoing violence has also resulted in the deaths of 10 individuals, including three children, during recent operations in Gaza City.
amharic: በጋዛ ከተማ ዘይቱን ሰፈር በእስራኤል የጦር መሳሪያ ድብደባ አንዲት ፍልስጤማዊት ሴት ሲገደሉ ሌሎች በርካቶች ቆስለዋል። ይህ ጥቃት በጋዛ ሰርጥ በድምሩ 24 ሰዎችን የገደለው ተከታታይ የእስራኤል ወታደራዊ ዘመቻ አካል ነው። በቅርቡ በተደረጉት ጥቃቶች ሶስት ህጻናትን ጨምሮ ሌሎች 10 ሰዎች ህይወታቸው አልፏል።
oromo: Magaala Gaza, naannoo Zayituunitti waraanni Israa'el mi'a waraanaa gurguddaan dhukaasuun dubartii Falasxeen tokko ajjeeseera, namoonni biroos hedduun madaa'aniiru. Haleellaan kun duula waraanaa Israa'el guyyoota darban keessa Gaza keessatti namoota 24 ajjeese keessatti kan dabalatuudha. Haleellaa dhihoo kana keessatti ijoollee sadii dabalatee namoonni 10 ajjeefamaniiru.

title: EU, Gulf states call on Iran to permanently open Hormuz without conditions
english: The European Union and several Gulf nations have jointly urged Iran to allow unrestricted access to the Strait of Hormuz. They are demanding that the waterway remain permanently open without requiring additional fees or setting any preconditions. This move aims to ensure the stability and safety of this vital global maritime route.
amharic: የአውሮፓ ህብረት እና የባህረ ሰላጤው አገራት ኢራን የሆርሙዝ ባህር ሰላጤን ያለ ምንም ቅድመ ሁኔታ እና ክፍያ ለዘላቂ አገልግሎት ክፍት እንድታደርግ ጠይቀዋል። አገራቱ ይህ የባህር መስመር ለአለም አቀፍ የንግድ እንቅስቃሴ ወሳኝ በመሆኑ፣ ያለ ምንም ገደብ እንዲሠራ ይፈልጋሉ። ይህ ጥረት የባህር ጉዞን ደህንነት ለማረጋገጥ ያለመ ነው።
oromo: Gamtaan Awurooppaa fi biyyoonni Ganna Garba Pershiyaa, Iraan qaxxaamura galaana Hormuz haala tokko malee fi kaffaltii malee akka bante akka turu gaafataniiru. Karaan galaanaa kun daldala addunyaatiif baay'ee barbaachisaa waan ta'eef, daangaa tokko malee ifatti akka tajaajilu barbaadu. Tarkaanfiin kun nageenyaa fi tasgabbii karaa galaanaa kanaa mirkaneessuuf kan gargaaruudha.

title: Palestinian teenage footballer dies a week after Israeli settler attack
english: Fadi Hamdallah al-Nassan, a 17-year-old Palestinian youth national team footballer, has passed away following a gunshot wound sustained during an Israeli settler attack in his village. The teenager was shot in the leg while trying to assist during the raid on Al-Mughayyir and died after complications from an amputation. His death highlights the growing violence in the West Bank and adds to the significant number of Palestinian athletes killed since the conflict escalated in late 2023.
amharic: የፍልስጤም ወጣቶች ብሔራዊ እግር ኳስ ቡድን ተጫዋች የነበረው የ17 ዓመቱ ፋዲ ሃምዳላህ አል-ናሳን በእስራኤል ሰፋሪዎች ጥቃት ምክንያት በደረሰበት ጥይት ህይወቱ አልፏል። ታዳጊው በአል-ሙጋዪር መንደር በደረሰ ጥቃት ወቅት ሰዎችን ለመርዳት ሲሞክር በተተኮሰበት ጥይት በእግሩ ላይ ከፍተኛ ጉዳት ደርሶበት፣ ህክምና ሲደረግለት ከቆየ በኋላ ህይወቱ ሊያልፍ ችሏል። የእርሱ ሞት በምዕራብ ባንክ እየጨመረ የመጣውን የሰፋሪዎች ጥቃት የሚያሳይ ሲሆን፣ ከጥቅምት 2023 ወዲህ ህይወታቸውን ያጡ የፍልስጤም አትሌቶችን ቁጥር ከፍ አድርጎታል።
oromo: Taphataan garee kubbaa miillaa dargaggoota Falasxiin kan ta'e Fadi Hamdallah Al-Nassan, erga humnoota Israa'el fi qonnaan bultoota biyya isaanii (settlers) magaalaa isaa irratti haleellaa raawwataniin booda madaa'ee du'eera. Dargaggeessi kun garaa gubaa yeroo haleellaan sun gaggeeffamaa turetti namoota gargaaruuf yeroo deemu miila isaa irratti dhukaasamee miidhame. Miidhama kana booda miilli isaa irraa muramee yaalamaa turee kan darbe yoo ta'u, duuti isaa kun haleellaa daangaa Lixa Baankii keessatti bal'ataa jiru kan agarsiisuudha.

title: Drone video shows scale of major wildfire in northern Spain
english: A massive wildfire is currently spreading across northern Spain, as captured by recent drone footage. The blaze has already scorched over 150 square kilometers of land along an 80-kilometer perimeter. Authorities are dealing with the significant scale of this environmental emergency as the fire continues to threaten the region.
amharic: በሰሜናዊ ስፔን የተቀሰቀሰ ትልቅ የደን ቃጠሎ በድሮን ምስሎች ታይቷል። እሳቱ ከ150 ስኩዌር ኪሎ ሜትር በላይ መሬትን ያወደመ ሲሆን የቃጠሎው ስፋትም 80 ኪሎ ሜትር ይደርሳል። ባለስልጣናት በአካባቢው ላይ ከፍተኛ ጉዳት እያደረሰ ያለውን ይህንን አደገኛ የእሳት አደጋ ለመቆጣጠር እየጣሩ ነው።
oromo: Kaameeraa oronii kaaseen akka agarsiisutti, ibidni bosonaa guddaan tokko gama kaabaa Ispeenitti babal'achaa jira. Ibidni kun lafa iskuweer kiilomeetira 150 ol ta'u erga gubee booda, naannoo kiilomeetira 80 haguugee argama. Aangwoonni naannichaa balaa naannoo kana ittisuuf carraaqqii gochaa jiru.

title: Why has the ‘ceasefire’ in Gaza failed to stop Israel’s attacks?
english: Despite a ceasefire agreement reached in October, Israeli military operations in the Gaza Strip continue, leading to ongoing civilian casualties. While Israel claims its strikes are directed at Hamas militants, health officials report that the majority of those killed are women and children. Meanwhile, international negotiations to advance the truce have reached a standstill, leaving the Palestinian population in a desperate situation.
amharic: በጥቅምት ወር የተደረሰውን የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነት ተከትሎ እስራኤል በጋዛ የምታደርገው ጥቃት አሁንም አላቆመም። እስራኤል ጥቃቱን የምታደርሰው በሀማስ ታጣቂዎች ላይ እንደሆነ ብትገልጽም፣ የጤና ሚኒስቴር መረጃዎች ግን አብዛኞቹ ተጎጂዎች ሴቶችና ህጻናት መሆናቸውን ያመለክታሉ። የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነቱን ለማስቀጠል የሚደረጉ ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ውይይቶች በመቆማቸው የጋዛ ህዝብ በከፍተኛ ችግር ውስጥ ይገኛል።
oromo: waliigalteen dhaabbii waraanaatiif ji'a Onkololeessa keessa erga godhamee booda, waraanni Israa'el gaaza keessatti raawwatu itti fufuun lubbuu nagaa baay'ee galaafachaa jira. Israa'el tarkaanfichi kan xiyyeeffatu loltoota Hamas irratti akka ta'e dubbattuus, gabaasni ministira fayyaa garuu namoonni du'an hedduun isaanii dubartoota fi daa'imman ta'uu ibsa. Mariin walii galtee kana gara sadarkaa itti aanutti ceesisuuf taasifamaa ture dhaabachuu isaa hordofee, haalli jireenyaa ummata Gaza daran hammaatee jira.

title: All to know about Canadian wildfire smoke, air quality and World Cup final
english: Concerns have emerged regarding the impact of Canadian wildfire smoke and severe thunderstorms on the upcoming World Cup final in New Jersey. Recent air quality levels in the region dropped significantly, but experts anticipate conditions will improve to a moderate level by the time the match begins. FIFA is currently working with local officials to monitor the situation and ensure the event proceeds safely.
amharic: በኒው ጀርሲ በሚካሄደው የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ ጨዋታ ላይ የካናዳ የደን ቃጠሎ ጭስ እና መጥፎ የአየር ሁኔታ ተጽዕኖ ሊያሳድሩ እንደሚችሉ ስጋት ተፈጥሯል። በክልሉ የአየር ጥራት በእጅጉ ቀንሶ የነበረ ቢሆንም፣ በጨዋታው ቀን ሁኔታው ወደ ተሻለ ደረጃ እንደሚደርስ ባለሙያዎች ይገምታሉ። ፊፋ ከሀገር ውስጥ ባለስልጣናት ጋር በመሆን የአየር ሁኔታውን በቅርበት እየተከታተለ ይገኛል።
oromo: Qulqullinni qilleensa naannoo Niiw Jarsii aara ibidda bosonaa Kaanaadaa irraa dhufteen miidhamee ture, kunis xumura tapha Waancaa Addunyaa irratti dhiibbaa uumuu danda'a jedhamee sodaatamaa jira. Haata'u malee, ogeeyyonni yeroo taphichi jalqabu qilleensichi gara sadarkaa gaariitti deebi'a jedhanii tilmaamu. FIFA'n haala qilleensa naannichaa hordofaa jiru yoo ta'u, qophii taphichaa tasgabbeessuuf aangoota naannoo wajjin waliin hojjetaa jira.

title: Thousands rally in London in support of Gaza, demand new PM take action
english: Thousands of protesters gathered in London to urge the incoming British Prime Minister, Andy Burnham, to stop supplying weapons to Israel and take a stronger stance against the war in Gaza. Demonstrators argued that the previous administration failed to adequately address the ongoing humanitarian crisis and urged the new government to end the UK's involvement in the conflict. The rally, which included prominent figures like Jeremy Corbyn, highlighted growing public pressure on the new leadership to prioritize accountability for the thousands of lives lost.
amharic: በለንደን በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ሰልፈኞች አዲሱ የብሪታኒያ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር አንዲ በርንሃም ለእስራኤል የጦር መሳሪያ መላክን እንዲያቆሙ እና በጋዛ ላይ ለሚካሄደው ጦርነት ጠንካራ አቋም እንዲወስዱ ጠይቀዋል። ተቃዋሚዎቹ የቀድሞው መንግስት ሰብአዊ ቀውሱን ለመፍታት በቂ ጥረት አላደረገም በማለት አዲሱ አመራር ብሪታኒያ በግጭቱ ያላትን ተሳትፎ እንዲያቆም አሳስበዋል። በጄረሚ ኮርቢን መሪነት የተካሄደው ይህ ሰልፍ፣ አዲሱ መንግስት ለተጎጂዎች ተጠያቂነትን በማስፈን ረገድ ትኩረት እንዲሰጥ ግፊት ለማድረግ ያለመ ነው።
oromo: London keessatti namoonni kumaatamaan lakkaawwaman hiriira ba’uun, muummichi ministeeraa biyyattii haaraa Andy Burnham, Israa’eliif meeshaalee waraanaa dhiyeessuu akka dhaabu fi waraana Gaazaarratti tarkaanfii cimaa akka fudhatu gaafataniiru. Hiriirtonni mootummaan duraa rakkoo namoomaa jiru furuuf gahaa kan hin taane ta’uu ibsuun, mootummaan haaraan kun hirmaannaa Britaan waraana kana keessatti qabdu akka dhaabu dhaamaniiru. Hiriirri kun, kan hogganoota beekamoo akka Jeremy Corbyn hirmaachise, dhiibbaa uummataa inni guddachaa jiru mootummaan haaraan sun itti gaafatamummaa akka fudhatu kan gaafatuudha.

title: Lebanese soldier killed as army vehicle hits explosive in south Lebanon
english: A Lebanese soldier died and two others were injured after their military vehicle struck an explosive device in the town of Mansouri. The Lebanese army confirmed the incident, while the Israeli military stated that the vehicle had entered a restricted security zone. An investigation is currently underway regarding the circumstances of the blast.
amharic: በደቡብ ሊባኖስ አል-ማንሱሪ ከተማ የሊባኖስ ጦር ተሽከርካሪ ፈንጂ በመርገጡ አንድ ወታደር ሲሞት ሁለት ሌሎች የጦር አባላት ቆስለዋል። የሊባኖስ ጦር ድርጊቱን ያረጋገጠ ሲሆን፣ የእስራኤል ወታደራዊ በበኩሉ ተሽከርካሪው ወደተከለከለ የጸጥታ ቀጠና በመግባቱ እንደተመታ አስታውቋል። በጉዳዩ ላይ ተጨማሪ ምርመራዎች እየተደረጉ ነው።
oromo: Magaalaa Mansuurii kan kibba Libaanoositti konkolaataan waraanaa Libaanoos tokko dhukaatuu irra buutee lubbuun waraanaa tokko yoo darbu, warri biroo lama immoo miidhamaniiru. Waraanni Libaanoos dhuga kana kan mirkaneesse yoo ta'u, waraanni Israa'el ammoo konkolaatichi iddoo eegumsa cimaa jiru keessa seenuufii akka ture ibseera. Iddoo kanaa fi haala inni itti uumame irratti qorannoon gaggeeffamaa jira.

title: UKMTO says vessel seized in Gulf of Aden now in Somali waters
english: A ship that was captured near the coast of Yemen yesterday has been moved into the territorial waters of Somalia. Maritime authorities have officially confirmed the incident as a hijacking. Officials are currently monitoring the situation after the vessel was taken by force.
amharic: ትናንት በየመን የባህር ዳርቻ አቅራቢያ ተይዞ የነበረው መርከብ በአሁኑ ወቅት ወደ ሶማሊያ ግዛት የባህር ክልል መግባቱ ተረጋግጧል። የባህር ላይ ደህንነት ባለስልጣናት ይህንን ድርጊት በይፋ እንደጠለፋ መፈረጃቸውን አስታውቀዋል። መርከቡ በኃይል ከተያዘ በኋላ ባለስልጣናት ሁኔታውን በቅርበት እየተከታተሉት ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Dooniin kalee qarqara galaana Yaman biratti qabame ture, amma gara daangaa bishaan Somaaliyaa geessameera. Aangeyyoonni galaanaas gochi kun karaa seeraan alaa butamuu isaa mirkaneessaniiru. Doonichi humnaan erga fudhatamee booda, qaamoleen dhimmi ilaallatu haala jiru hordofaa jiru.

title: Two US troops killed and one missing after Iranian attack in Jordan
english: Two American soldiers were killed and another is missing following Iranian drone and missile strikes in Jordan. This incident occurred as the US military continues a series of retaliatory attacks against Iran after a brief ceasefire failed. Several other US personnel were injured in the assault, and tensions continue to escalate as the regional conflict persists.
amharic: በዮርዳኖስ በተፈጸመ የኢራን ድሮን እና ሚሳይል ጥቃት ሁለት የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች ሲገደሉ አንድ ወታደር ደግሞ የደረሰበት አልታወቀም። ይህ ጥቃት የተፈጸመው የአሜሪካ እና የኢራን የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነት በመፍረሱ አሜሪካ በኢራን ላይ ጥቃት እየሰነዘረች ባለችበት ወቅት ነው። በዚሁ ጥቃት ሌሎች የአሜሪካ ወታደሮችም ጉዳት የደረሰባቸው ሲሆን፣ በሁለቱ አገራት መካከል ያለው ግጭት ተባብሶ ቀጥሏል።
oromo: Jordaanitti haleellaa xiyyaara malee fi misayilii Iraan geggeessiteen waraana Ameerikaa lama yoo du'an, tokko immoo iddoon buuteen isaa dhabameera. Haleellaan kun kan raawwatame yeroo Ameerikaan fi Iraan walii galtee waraana dhaabuu diiganii, Ameerikaan Iraan irratti haleellaa deebitee geggeessaa jirtutti. Haleellaa kanaan waraanotni Ameerikaa biroo midhamaniiru; walitti bu'iinsi biyyoota lamaanii fi naannichaa caalaatti hammaachaa dhufeera.

title: Hungary's president agrees to stand down after parliament backs removal
english: Hungarian President Tamás Sulyok has agreed to resign after the new government, led by the Tisza party, passed legislation to remove him. This move is part of broader constitutional changes aimed at purging officials associated with the former administration of Viktor Orbán. The government also mandated the removal of the Constitutional Court head and implemented strict age and term limits for judicial and parliamentary members.
amharic: የሃንጋሪው ፕሬዝዳንት ታማስ ሱልዮክ፣ በአዲሱ መንግስት እና በቲዛ ፓርቲ አባላት ግፊት ከስልጣን ለመልቀቅ ተስማምተዋል። ይህ እርምጃ በቀድሞው ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ቪክቶር ኦርባን አስተዳደር ተፅዕኖ ስር የነበሩ ባለስልጣናትን ከስልጣን ለማስወገድ ከተደረጉ የህገ-መንግስት ማሻሻያዎች አንዱ ነው። በተጨማሪም አዲሱ አስተዳደር የህገ-መንግስት ፍርድ ቤት ኃላፊን ጨምሮ ሌሎች ከፍተኛ ባለስልጣናትን በዕድሜ እና በስልጣን ዘመን ገደብ መሰረት ከስልጣን አባሯል።
oromo: Pirezedantiin Hangaarii Taamaas Sulyook, mootummaan haarayni paartii Tiizaan hoogganamu aangoo irraa akka isa buusu erga murteesseen booda, fedhii isaatiin gadi lakkisee ba'uuf walii galeera. Tarkaanfiin kun jijjiirama heera mootummaa kan duraanii kan ministira muummee kanaan duraa Viiktor Orbaan wajjin wal qabatu akka dhaabbatu godhu dha. Mootummaan kun hooggantoota mana maree heeraa fi abbootii seeraa umuriin isaanii fi yeroon aangoo isaanii daangaa darbetti akka aangoo gadi lakkisanis dirqisiiseera.

title: German politician resigns over surrogacy child controversy
english: German politician Jens Spahn has resigned from his leadership role after facing backlash for using a surrogate mother to have a child. Because surrogacy is illegal in Germany and Spahn had previously supported these restrictive laws, critics accused him of hypocrisy. He ultimately decided to step down, stating that his family life and his political responsibilities were no longer compatible.
amharic: የጀርመን ፖለቲከኛ የሆኑት የንስ ስፓን በውጭ አገር የኪራይ ማህፀን በመጠቀም ልጅ በመውለዳቸው በተነሳባቸው ትችት ከፓርላማ ቡድን መሪነታቸው መልቀቃቸውን አስታውቀዋል። በጀርመን የኪራይ ማህፀን ህገወጥ በመሆኑ እና ስፓን ቀደም ሲል ይህንን ህግ ይደግፉ ስለነበር፣ ድርጊታቸው አድርባይነት ነው በሚል ሲተቹ ቆይተዋል። በመጨረሻም የቤተሰብ ህይወታቸው እና የፖለቲካ ስልጣናቸው አብረው ሊሄዱ አልቻሉም በሚል ከኃላፊነታቸው ለቀዋል።
oromo: Polaatikoon Jarman Jens Spaan, biyya alaa deemuun haadha buusaa (surrogacy) fayyadamuun mucaa waan godhatanif mormiin guddaan isaanirra gahee, hoggansa isaanii gadhiisuuf dirqamaniiru. Jarman keessatti haadha buusaa fayyadamuun seeraan alaa fi Spaan dursee seera kana kan deeggaran waan ta'aniif, gochi kun fakkeessummaa dha jechuun mormiituun isaan qeequ turan. Xumura irratti jireenyi maatii isaanii fi hojiin siyaasaa isaanii wal-faayidaa akka hin taane hubachuun, aangoo isaanii gadhiisuuf murteessaniiru.

title: Iran supreme leader warns of ‘unforgettable lessons’ if US attacks continue
english: Iran's Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, has accused the United States of breaking recent agreements and condemned the latest American strikes on Iranian civilian infrastructure. He declared that President Trump's commitments are unreliable and warned that Iran and its allies are prepared to deliver severe consequences if the aggression continues. As the ongoing conflict escalates, Iran remains defiant while calling on its citizens to stay alert and trust the government's defense strategies.
amharic: የኢራን ጠቅላይ መሪ ሞጅታባ ካሜኔይ፣ አሜሪካ በቅርቡ የተደረሱ ስምምነቶችን እንደጣሰች በመግለጽ በኢራን ሲቪል መሰረተ ልማቶች ላይ ያደረሰችውን ጥቃት አውግዘዋል። የፕሬዚዳንት ትራምፕ ፊርማ ምንም ዋጋ እንደሌለው የተናገሩት መሪው፣ ጥቃቱ የሚቀጥል ከሆነ ኢራን እና አጋሮቿ ለአሜሪካ የማይረሱ ትምህርቶችን እንደሚሰጡ አስጠንቅቀዋል። ግጭቱ እየተባባሰ በሄደበት በዚህ ወቅት፣ ኢራን አቋሟን እንደማትቀይር ገልጻ፣ ህዝቧም በትኩረት እንዲከታተልና በመንግስት ላይ እምነት እንዲጥል ጥሪ አቅርባለች።
oromo: Hoggantoonni olaanoon Iraan, Mojtaba Khamenei, Ameerikaan walii galtee kanaan dura irra gahame cabsuushee fi bu'uuraalee misoomaa Iraan irratti haleellaa raawwachuushee balaaleffataniiru. Akka hogganaan kun jedhanitti, mallattoon Pirezidaant Traamp kan amanamu miti; haleellaan kun yoo itti fufe, Iraanii fi kutaaleen ishee ishee deggeran Ameerikaaf barnoota hin dagatamne akka kennan akeekkachiisaniiru.
